faqs.question: What is the TNEA application fee?
faqs.answer: The application fee for TNEA is INR 500 for the general candidates and INR 250 for SC /SCA /ST category belonging to Tamil Nadu.

faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Sengunthar Engineering College as a good Institute?
faqs.answer: Sengunthar Engineering College is a reputed institute for B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Sengunthar Engineering College has a rating of 3.7 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4 on campuslife, 3.3 on placements, 4.1 on faculty and 3.3 on Infrastructure.

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at Sengunthar Engineering College are BTech and MBA. The college offers these programmes to students at UG and PG levels. Further, the college offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. Sengunthar Engineering courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at SEC Tamil Nadu in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
Sengunthar Engineering College placement report for 2025 has not been released. Earlier, as per the NIRF report 2022 released, the median package received during Sengunthar Engineering College placement 2021 for BTech and MTech programs stood at INR 3.2 LPA and INR 2.4 LPA, respectively.

A total of 96 students were placed, and 10 students opted for higher studies out of a total of 112 students during BTech placements 2021. MTech placement rate recorded during Sengunthar Engineering College placement 2021 was 100%.

faqs.answer: A:    As per unofficial sources, Sengunthar Engineering College students have a strong alumni network. They are working in various sectors such as Engineering, Operations, Business Development, IT, and more. To know the function-wise alumni placements, check out the pie chart below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sengunthar Engineering College offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Sengunthar Engineering College courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Sengunthar Engineering College courses stands around INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The course fee for BTech and BE course is INR 50,000 (Government Quota) and INR 85,000 (Management Quota). Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats.
faqs.question: What is the course fee for BTech courses at Sengunthar College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    Sengunthar College of Engineering considers Class 12 score for UG and graduation marks for PG programmes. Aspirants must fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for admission. Below is course-wise Sengunthar College of Engineering eligibility criteria:CourseCommon EligibilityBTech/ BEClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry and MathematicsMEGraduation*
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for Sengunthar College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who have passed graduation are eligible to apply for Sengunthar College of Engineering ME programmes. Besides, aspirants must also qualify CEETA PG or GATE or CET for admission to ME programme. Aspirants need to participate in CEETA PG Counselling for a seat in Sengunthar College of Engineering.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for ME at Sengunthar College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates have to fill out the CEETA PG application form for Sengunthar College of Engineering ME programme. The application fee is INR 1,800 + GST (INR 900 + GST for SC/ ST/ SCA of Tamil Nadu). Aspirants can pay the application fee via any of the online payment modes. Further, candidates also need to pay a counselling fee to apply for CEETA PG counselling for ME admission.
faqs.question: What is the CEETA PG application fee for Sengunthar College of Engineering?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sengunthar Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: The maximum student percent is above 75% because of our teachers teaching methods. In our course, the average package is offered to a maximum of 80% of students. TCS, Wipro, etc. are the top recruiting companies for our course. Eligibility for students to get an internship is that there are no arrears in their previous papers.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, there are experiment labs, software resources, computer rooms, projector rooms, and smart boards. Classrooms are equipped with audiovisual aids. Seminar rooms are there for group discussion. There is a well-stocked library. Also, we have good mess, a canteen, medical facilities, sports and play grounds, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, and the infrastructure was good.

review_content.Placements: The percent of students placed in our college is approximately 20% per year. In our course, the highest package is INR 5 LPA, and the lowest package is INR 2 LPA. The required companies for our course are Infosys, TCS, and Wipro. The role offered in our course involves most of the computer software roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities of the college are good, but the hostel is bad. The class rooms and library labs are good; in our hostel, no quality food and snacks are provided in the mess, but the canteen is good. Medical facilities are available, and sports and games are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is an excellent place to build your career.

review_content.Placements: In our college, almost 70% of students got placed in our batch as well as our department. The highest salary offered was Rs.16,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs.12,000 per month. There were no internships or industrial visits. The top role offered was a quality inspector.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had good infrastructure and laboratory facilities. The campus is vast with excellent canteen facilities. Our hostel was so good in terms of buildings as well as the surrounding water facilities which were good. The food was delicious, and there were unlimited meals available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in 2022.

review_content.Placements: A total of 52 companies visited our college, and the placement percentage was 90%. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. Our placement cell provides entrepreneurial skills and opportunities by conducting regular inductive programs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus has separate hostels for boys and girls. We have a sports complex, a badminton court, a basketball court, a cricket ground, a football ground, and a volleyball court. We have an electronics lab, a mechanical lab, a survey lab, and a Linux lab. The college has a central library with 40,000 books, 120 Indian periodicals, and 56 international periodicals. The library has a collection of more than 1,400 CDS. A number of books for the preparation of competitive exams like GATE, TOEFL, GRE, GMAT, defense service, and civil service are available in both reference and issue sections.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has moderate infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: About 30% of the students from our course were placed. The average salary package offered for students is Rs. 15,000 per month. The top recruiting company for our course is Techno Limited. The top roles offered in recruitment drives are fresher trainees. The average salary package in our course for students is 2 LPA. About 50% of the students got internships from our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities available for our department include moderate lab facilities. The quality of the hostel is a little bit low, and the food served is the worst. The infrastructure of our college is a bit average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I was very impressed and satisfied with college because they provide many placement opportunities.

review_content.Placements: Students who secured above 60% in academics got placed in our college. The maximum salary offered is Rs. 30,000 per month and the average salary offered is Rs. 19,000 per month and the minimum salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month. The highest salary package offered is providing internship for a maximum of 2 months, and the lowest package is for providing placement training for all students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our course is very good, and they provide Wi-Fi facility with 100Mbps speed. Labs facilities are best and maintenance was very good. The hostel has a very good infrastructure. Water and food facilities were good.

faqs.question: Q: Is it worth to consider Sengunthar Engineering College as a good Institute?

faqs.answer: Sengunthar College of Engineering offers two courses at UG and PG levels. The college offers BE/ BTech at UG and ME at PG level. The basic eligibility to apply for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programme. The selection is both merit and entrance-based at Sengunthar College of Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: What are the courses offered at Sengunthar College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: Yes, it is worth pursuing BTech at Sengunthar Engineering College as the college has been approved by AICTE and is affiliated with the Anna University of Technology, Chennai. Further, the college offers a wide range of programmes at UG and PG levels in various departments such as Science & Humanities, Robotics & Automation, Information Technology, Medical Electronics, etc. Most importantly, Sengunthar Engineering College courses are provided to students at reasonable fees, to enable students to acquire knowledge and skills in their preferred area of interest.

admission_overview.college_name: Sengunthar Engineering College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Sengunthar Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sengunthar Engineering College admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingEngineering and Business and Management Studies.Sengunthar Engineering Collegeadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asGATE, CEETA, and TANCET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 35,000 - 2,00,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

The institute offers admission in 810 seats of B.E. / B.Tech.

faqs.question: Does Sengunthar College of Engineering offers lateral entry to BTech course?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sengunthar College of Engineering offers lateral to BE/ BTech programme. The selection for BE (Lateral Entry) is based on marks obtained in the Diploma examination. Candidates have to complete a minimum of Diploma for admission to BE (Lateral Entry) programmes.

faqs.question: How can I get seat in BTech at Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Sengunthar College of Engineering offers seats in BE/BTech course based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants have to complete Class 12 with PCM for BE/ BTech admission. Selected candidates are further offered seat through TNEA Counselling. Aspirants have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: What are the various B.E specialisations offered at Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Sengunthar College of Engineering offers four-year BE/ BTech programme divided into eight semesters. Candidates after completing Class 12 can apply for BE/ BTech. Below are the BE/ BTech specialisations offered at SCE:BE Medical ElectronicsBE Robotics & AutomationBTech Information Technology

courses_data.name: Sengunthar Engineering College M.E./M.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Sengunthar Engineering College M.E./M.Techis offered to candidates at the PG level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the M.E./M.Tech programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 2 years programme.

faqs.question: Is CEETA-PG required for M.Tech at Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes, CEETA-PG is required for admission to ME at Sengunthar College of Engineering. CEETA is the Common Entrance Examination for Engineering and Architecture which is mandatory for admission to ME. Applicants seeking admission to ME are required to apply and appear for CEETA- PG to be eligible for admission.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for ME at Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed graduation are eligible to apply for Sengunthar College of Engineering ME programmes. Besides, aspirants must also qualify CEETA PG or GATE or CET for admission to ME programme. Aspirants need to participate in CEETA PG Counselling for a seat in Sengunthar College of Engineering.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in M.Tech at Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: No, Sengunthar College of Engineering does not offer direct admission to ME course. Candidates have to pass CEETA PG, CET or GATE for admission to ME programme. Besides, aspirants must also complete their graduation to apply for admission. The seats are offered in ME course through CEETA PG Counselling.

faqs.question: What is the total fee for Sengunthar Engineering College M.Tech and BTech course?
faqs.answer: The fee varies from course to course. Sengunthar Engineering College offers two courses BTech and MTech. Candidates note that the given fee is as per the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Below is the table showing BTech and M.Tech fees at Sengunthar Engineering College:CoursesTuition FeeBTechINR 2 lakhMTechINR 50,000

courses_data.name: Sengunthar Engineering College MBA/PGDM Admission 2025
courses_data.description: TheMBA/PGDMatSengunthar Engineering Collegeis a 2 years programme offered to the students in the field of Business & Management Studies. Admission to this course is offered based on a valid score in TANCET. To complete the Sengunthar Engineering College admission process for the 2025 batch, selected candidates must pay the applicable course fee ofINR 35,000.

faqs.question: Is GATE accepted at Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sengunthar College of Engineering considers GATE score for admission to ME programme.Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering or GATEis a national-level entrance examination conducted once in a year in online. Aspirants have to participate in CEETA PG Counselling with a valid score in GATE. Besides, aspirants can also apply for admission in ME with CEETA PG scores.

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted at Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Sengunthar College of Engineering considers entrance exam score for admission to ME programme. The college offers admission based on GATE, CET or CEETA PG scores. Aspirants once selected have to participate in CEETA PG Counselling for seat allotment. For BE, no entrance exam is required. The selection for BE is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Sengunthar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Sengunthar College of Engineering admissions are merit or entrance-based. The college considers Class 12 score for BE followed by the TNEA Counselling. The selection for ME is based on GATE, CET or CEETA PG scores. Selected candidates need to participate in CEETA PG counselling for seat in Sengunthar Engineering College ME programme.

faqs.question: Can I join Sengunthar College of Engineering without TNEA Counselling?
faqs.answer: The answer to this question depends on the course selected by the candidates. Any aspirants who wish to get admission in Sengunthar College of Engineering BE programme need to participate in the TNEA Counselling. During the counselling, candidates are alloted seat in the institutes based on the Class 12 score of the candidates. Hence, candidates cannot take admission in BE without TNEA Counselling.

A total of 96 students were placed and 10 students opted for higher studies out of total 112 students during BTech placements 2021. MTech placement rate recorded during Sengunthar Engineering College placement 2021 was 100%.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sengunthar Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sengunthar Engineering College.
reviews.review_text:
In our college, there are experiment labs, software resources, computer rooms, projector rooms, and smart boards.
Classrooms are equipped with audiovisual aids.
Seminar rooms are there for group discussion.
There is a well-stocked library. 
Also, we have good mess, a canteen, medical facilities, sports and play grounds, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, and the infrastructure was good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of the college are good, but the hostel is bad. The class rooms and library labs are good; in our hostel, no quality food and snacks are provided in the mess, but the canteen is good. Medical facilities are available, and sports and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is an excellent place to build your career.
reviews.review_text: Our college had good infrastructure and laboratory facilities. The campus is vast with excellent canteen facilities. Our hostel was so good in terms of buildings as well as the surrounding water facilities which were good. The food was delicious, and there were unlimited meals available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in 2022.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has separate hostels for boys and girls. We have a sports complex, a badminton court, a basketball court, a cricket ground, a football ground, and a volleyball court. We have an electronics lab, a mechanical lab, a survey lab, and a Linux lab. The college has a central library with 40,000 books, 120 Indian periodicals, and 56 international periodicals. The library has a collection of more than 1,400 CDS. A number of books for the preparation of competitive exams like GATE, TOEFL, GRE,...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has moderate infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for our department include moderate lab facilities. The quality of the hostel is a little bit low, and the food served is the worst. The infrastructure of our college is a bit average.

reviews.review_heading: I was very impressed and satisfied with college because they provide many placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course is very good, and they provide Wi-Fi facility with 100Mbps speed. Labs facilities are best and maintenance was very good. The hostel has a very good infrastructure. Water and food facilities were good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied about my college features.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library and water facility with neat and pure air even in classrooms and hostels. Medical facilities may depend on features of the module. There is equal importance to sports and games. Mess and canteen provide tasty food.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with studies but not with the placements.
reviews.review_text: It's not big college. It's an average college. We have all labs and classes and other requirements, but they are only limited. So we can't consider it a well-constructed college, but we do have everything for your studies related things.

reviews.review_heading: In college, there are days when celebrations are also going. It organises many other programs and ev
reviews.review_text: There are no hostels at the college. The college infrastructure is neither very good nor very bad. There are no games at the college. There is no Wi-Fi. Departments are good and very helpful to us. The food quality is good. Classrooms are good, and labs are also good. A hostel is in the center of the city with friendly staff members, clean facilities, and comfortable beds. The hostel has a fully fitted kitchen, strong Wi-Fi, and clean toilets and showers. Our college campus is looking very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely better.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in the college, like classrooms, library, labs, and workshops, are good. The quality of food is average. Sports in college are good. They will train for sports for which we would like them to be good.

reviews.review_heading: Should include key terms that reflect the content of the review.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in the college and hostel. The college has a good academic environment with supportive faculty. Classrooms and labs are well-maintained and equipped. Hostel facilities are clean and comfortable for students. The library has a wide range of books and digital resources. Fees are reasonable compared to the facilities provided. It is a good college for both academics and personal development.

college_info.college_name: South Point Institute of Technology & Management: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registrations for session 2 started for South Point Institute of Technology & Management admission to the BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The last date to register for the same is Feb 25, 2026. Further, the session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: South Point Institute of Technology & Management is a private institute, established in 2008 in Sonepat, Haryana. South Point Institute of Technology & Management is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 21 courses at UG and PG levels in 6 specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering and Mechanical Engineering. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA and BCA in both Full Time and Part Time modes. South Point Institute of Technology & Management fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 56,100 to 1,80,000. South Point Institute of Technology & Management has an annual seat intake of 1008 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: South Point Institute of Technology & Management provides Full Time and Part Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software, and have a fee structure of around INR 56,100 to 1,80,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The best infrastructure, good campus, and the teachers were very kind and helpful.

review_content.Placements: About 80 percent of students get placed at the college. The highest package offered is 25 lacs per annum, the minimum is 10 lacs per annum and the lowest package is 5 lacs per annum. Recruiters came from various companies and they selected about 60 percent of the students. Almost every student gets an internship through the course and different companies. It will help you learn how to start a business, run it and become a successful businessman.
review_content.Infrastructure: Almost every facility was on the college campus, such as the canteen or mess, Wi-Fi in every department and classrooms were well maintained and clean. All types of books were available in the college for the students and they provided books for the whole semester without any charges. The quality of food in the mess and the canteen was very good and delicious. The medical facilities were also good. Sports and games happen twice a year. Almost all types of game equipment are there and there is also a gym on the college campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is very good and beautiful.

review_content.Placements: Almost 75-80% of the students got placed in our course. The highest fee charged is Rs. 35,000 per semester, the lowest fee charged is Rs. 25,000 per semester, and the average fee charged is Rs. 30,000 per semester. HCL was the recruiting company. Almost 20-30% of the students who passed the interview got an internship in Compaq and HCL.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is well-equipped with laboratories, spacious classrooms, a Wi-Fi facility and a canteen. Most importantly is there is a very beautiful and well-maintained garden, which makes the ambience amazing. The college hostel was not that good, so students paid for nearby rent rooms or PGs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: A review of South Point college.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not provided by the college, especially for civil engineering students. According to my opinion, placements are a part of the college education system. Without placements, students will have no opportunities. All the students of every engineering branch are capable of getting placements, but the college does not provide the environment for it.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is good, and many students join the college every year. Infrastructure is the most important part of the education system.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good only because of our teachers and principal, who are helpful.

review_content.Placements: In our college, the placements will be held for two times during the course, but at the time of giving the job, they change all the conditions and also decrease the salary. They charge Rs.2,500 for giving the placements. At last, when the next placements were conducted, we didn't go because of these bad experiences. So, there are no good placements in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, classrooms, library, sports room are okay, but the classrooms are not air-conditioned. The library is very small. The college waiting room is also not air-conditioned. In our college, there is Jio Wi-Fi which has a limit of 34 MB.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The campus is good, and I don't have any issue.

review_content.Placements: Our college always invites the companies to the campus, and most of the students placed in those companies. It is a good college for higher studies. The college campus is good. Most of the companies visit the college and offer many jobs. The companies like Mahindra, TATA Yazaki, Samsung, etc., visit the campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good. We have a noiseless environment. In our college, there is a huge building for classes. Our college has a Wi-Fi facility for students. Many labs like a computer lab, chemistry lab, electrical lab, workshop, etc., are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Good college with good placements.

review_content.Placements: The placement here is mostly for computer science and information technology-related batches and not that much for the electronics branch. We get TCS as our core company and many other companies also do take part for selection of college students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has no hostel provision. The campus is quite small and the buildings are ragged. The campus is built on another's institute's hostel premises and is very ragged in terms of looks. The canteen food in unremarkable but the staff members are quite friendly and helpful.

review_summary.college_name: South Point Institute of Technology & Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best infrastructure, good campus, and the teachers were very kind and helpful.

content.Placements: About 80 percent of students get placed at the college. The highest package offered is 25 lacs per annum, the minimum is 10 lacs per annum and the lowest package is 5 lacs per annum. Recruiters came from various companies and they selected about 60 percent of the students. Almost every student gets an internship through the course and different companies. It will help you learn how to start a business, run it and become a successful businessman.
content.Infrastructure: Almost every facility was on the college campus, such as the canteen or mess, Wi-Fi in every department and classrooms were well maintained and clean. All types of books were available in the college for the students and they provided books for the whole semester without any charges. The quality of food in the mess and the canteen was very good and delicious. The medical facilities were also good. Sports and games happen twice a year. Almost all types of game equipment are there and there is also a gym on the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Everything is very good and beautiful.

content.Placements: Almost 75-80% of the students got placed in our course. The highest fee charged is Rs. 35,000 per semester, the lowest fee charged is Rs. 25,000 per semester, and the average fee charged is Rs. 30,000 per semester. HCL was the recruiting company. Almost 20-30% of the students who passed the interview got an internship in Compaq and HCL.
content.Infrastructure: The college is well-equipped with laboratories, spacious classrooms, a Wi-Fi facility and a canteen. Most importantly is there is a very beautiful and well-maintained garden, which makes the ambience amazing. The college hostel was not that good, so students paid for nearby rent rooms or PGs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: A review of South Point college.

content.Placements: Placements are not provided by the college, especially for civil engineering students. According to my opinion, placements are a part of the college education system. Without placements, students will have no opportunities. All the students of every engineering branch are capable of getting placements, but the college does not provide the environment for it.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is good, and many students join the college every year. Infrastructure is the most important part of the education system.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good only because of our teachers and principal, who are helpful.

content.Placements: In our college, the placements will be held for two times during the course, but at the time of giving the job, they change all the conditions and also decrease the salary. They charge Rs.2,500 for giving the placements. At last, when the next placements were conducted, we didn't go because of these bad experiences. So, there are no good placements in our college.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, classrooms, library, sports room are okay, but the classrooms are not air-conditioned. The library is very small. The college waiting room is also not air-conditioned. In our college, there is Jio Wi-Fi which has a limit of 34 MB.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The campus is good, and I don't have any issue.

content.Placements: Our college always invites the companies to the campus, and most of the students placed in those companies. It is a good college for higher studies. The college campus is good. Most of the companies visit the college and offer many jobs. The companies like Mahindra, TATA Yazaki, Samsung, etc., visit the campus.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good. We have a noiseless environment. In our college, there is a huge building for classes. Our college has a Wi-Fi facility for students. Many labs like a computer lab, chemistry lab, electrical lab, workshop, etc., are available.

paragraphs: South Point Institute of Technology and Management admission 2025 is merit-based. To apply for the programmes offered, students need to clear the preset admission criteria. At South Point Institute of Technology and Management, students can pursue wide range of programmes in fields, such as Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software.

Some of the popular South Point Institute of Technology and Management programmes are BBA and BCA, etc at UG level and MBA/PGDM and MCA at PG level. These programmes are offered in full time mode. See below the key highlights for South Point Institute of Technology and Management admissions:

college_info.college_name: Dadi Institute of Engineering and Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration process has started for Dadi Institute of Engineering and Technology admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The last date to register without a late fee is Mar 7, 2026. Further, the BTech exam is going to be conducted from May 12 to May 15, 2026, and on May 18, 2026. The BPharma exam is going to be held from May 19 to May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: Established in 2006, Dadi Institute of Engineering and Technology is a private institute in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh. The institute is approved by the AICTE. At the UG, PG and After 10th levels, the institute offers 20 courses across 6 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Dadi Institute of Engineering and Technology programs include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA and BCA. Dadi Institute of Engineering and Technology courses are provided in several streams including Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 1242 students. The fees at Dadi Institute of Engineering and Technology ranges between INR 54,000 to 1,89,600 for the different courses. Dadi Institute of Engineering and Technology placements are vibrant, with the average median salary standing at around INR 3,55,333. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

Major specialisation at Dadi Institute of Engineering and Technology are Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Power Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Good info to join the college rather than spending more on universities.

review_content.Placements: Around 80 percent are in my course and the highest package is about 22 LPA, the lowest is about 3 LPA, and the average package is 6 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Tech Mahindra, Accenture, etc. Around 80 percent of students got internships from my course in Tech Mahindra and other companies. Top roles offered in my courses are programmers and developers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are good and Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and library are good and comfortable for us without any break. We can do everything we do in a good and planned way so we do not have any distractions while we are doing work and food is also very hygienic.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Beauty of Dadi Institute of Engineering Technology.

review_content.Placements: I am studying Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and machine learning. In my branch, almost all the students have good knowledge of coding. Every year, almost 80 percent of students get a placement offer after writing exams. We get good companies for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. The classrooms are very neat and clean. We have Wi-Fi facility. We also have a library with good and knowledgeable books where we can read in our leisure time. The canteen is also very good, and we have good hygiene in the canteen. We don't have a hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied according to how I feel, and I don't have many expectations from the course.

review_content.Placements: Around 10–15% of students get placed in college at well-known MNCs like Wipro, TCS, etc. The highest package offered in the college is 7.5 LPA and the lowest is 4.5 LPA. More than 40% of students have received internship offers on campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. Includes well-stocked libraries, e-libraries, a playground, a good sports area, and a seminar hall for all types of events conducted by the management as well as students. There is also a medical facility, and the first aid kit is always available on the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied according to my fees. There are not much expectations on the course.

review_content.Placements: About 20-30% of the students are placed. The highest package is around 6 LPA - 7 LPA, and the lowest package is around 4.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, etc. 30-40% of students got internship offers in some IT companies at Visakhapatnam. Most of the students have code developer and web developer roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite decent, where the college offers labs according to the subjects. There is a central library. An e-library is also available. Unfortunately, there is no hostel facility at the college. But there are medical facilities, sports, and playground.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Dadi Institute of Engineering and Technology.

review_content.Placements: A higher percentage of students are placed in my course. The average package offered in my course is 6 LPA. Top recruitment companies are Wipro, Infosys, Accenture, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure available for my course/department is quite good. The labs are highly equipped with costly items. The classroom is normal and digital too. The library is another excellence. The facilities available in the college have been good.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are highly qualified and technical too. They are very helpful to the students. The faculty-student relationship is quite good. The teaching quality is high. The course curriculum is very relevant. It makes students industry-ready. The semesters are not very hard to pass. The pass percentage is high.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: An average college with supportive faculty members. I am satisfied with the infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not very good. However, faculty members and management can provide us with opportunities if we have the right skill set and are dedicated as of now. The highest package is nearly 8 LPA. Mostly, Accenture hires, and only 5-10% of students get placed. For internships, recently, they have been making links with USA-based companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is average and the food is good in the canteen. We also have a cafeteria for snacks and food. Facilities for labs are somewhat consistent but have a good internet connection. It has nice systems. Sports and games are well supported with a cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball courts, lawn tennis courts, kho-kho court, handball court, etc.

review_summary.college_name: Dadi Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good info to join the college rather than spending more on universities.

content.Placements: Around 80 percent are in my course and the highest package is about 22 LPA, the lowest is about 3 LPA, and the average package is 6 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Tech Mahindra, Accenture, etc. Around 80 percent of students got internships from my course in Tech Mahindra and other companies. Top roles offered in my courses are programmers and developers.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are good and Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and library are good and comfortable for us without any break. We can do everything we do in a good and planned way so we do not have any distractions while we are doing work and food is also very hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Beauty of Dadi Institute of Engineering Technology.

content.Placements: I am studying Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and machine learning. In my branch, almost all the students have good knowledge of coding. Every year, almost 80 percent of students get a placement offer after writing exams. We get good companies for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. The classrooms are very neat and clean. We have Wi-Fi facility. We also have a library with good and knowledgeable books where we can read in our leisure time. The canteen is also very good, and we have good hygiene in the canteen. We don't have a hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied according to how I feel, and I don't have many expectations from the course.

content.Placements: Around 10–15% of students get placed in college at well-known MNCs like Wipro, TCS, etc. The highest package offered in the college is 7.5 LPA and the lowest is 4.5 LPA. More than 40% of students have received internship offers on campus.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. Includes well-stocked libraries, e-libraries, a playground, a good sports area, and a seminar hall for all types of events conducted by the management as well as students. There is also a medical facility, and the first aid kit is always available on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied according to my fees. There are not much expectations on the course.

content.Placements: About 20-30% of the students are placed. The highest package is around 6 LPA - 7 LPA, and the lowest package is around 4.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, etc. 30-40% of students got internship offers in some IT companies at Visakhapatnam. Most of the students have code developer and web developer roles.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite decent, where the college offers labs according to the subjects. There is a central library. An e-library is also available. Unfortunately, there is no hostel facility at the college. But there are medical facilities, sports, and playground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dadi Institute of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: A higher percentage of students are placed in my course. The average package offered in my course is 6 LPA. Top recruitment companies are Wipro, Infosys, Accenture, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure available for my course/department is quite good. The labs are highly equipped with costly items. The classroom is normal and digital too. The library is another excellence. The facilities available in the college have been good.
content.Faculty: The teachers are highly qualified and technical too. They are very helpful to the students. The faculty-student relationship is quite good. The teaching quality is high. The course curriculum is very relevant. It makes students industry-ready. The semesters are not very hard to pass. The pass percentage is high.

reviews.review_heading: Good info to join the college rather than spending more on universities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are good and Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and library are good and comfortable for us without any break. We can do everything we do in a good and planned way so we do not have any distractions while we are doing work and food is also very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Beauty of Dadi Institute of Engineering Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. The classrooms are very neat and clean. We have Wi-Fi facility. We also have a library with good and knowledgeable books where we can read in our leisure time. The canteen is also very good, and we have good hygiene in the canteen. We don't have a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied according to how I feel, and I don't have many expectations from the course.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. Includes well-stocked libraries, e-libraries, a playground, a good sports area, and a seminar hall for all types of events conducted by the management as well as students. There is also a medical facility, and the first aid kit is always available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied according to my fees. There are not much expectations on the course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite decent, where the college offers labs according to the subjects. There is a central library. An e-library is also available. Unfortunately, there is no hostel facility at the college. But there are medical facilities, sports, and playground.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dadi Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available for my course/department is quite good. The labs are highly equipped with costly items. The classroom is normal and digital too. The library is another excellence. The facilities available in the college have been good.

reviews.review_heading: An average college with supportive faculty members. I am satisfied with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is average and the food is good in the canteen. We also have a cafeteria for snacks and food. Facilities for labs are somewhat consistent but have a good internet connection. It has nice systems. Sports and games are well supported with a cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball courts, lawn tennis courts, kho-kho court, handball court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: College life with good teaching.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is so good and our college has a big library. Canteen is available and the food in our canteen is so good compared with other college canteens. Classrooms are also so nice and facilities provide good care for students.

reviews.review_heading: Students should get more placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The environment is student-friendly. The labs have all the facilities required for the students. There is no hostel in our college. The canteen always maintains good-quality food. Whenever there is a need for dedication, the college management takes care of it.

reviews.review_heading: An amazing platform for the students to enlighten themselves in this course.
reviews.review_text: We will be having 2 libraries which are E-library where desktops are provided with Wi-Fi, and different collections central library consists of subject and course-related books for the branches and all technology books are provided. We don't have any hostel facility but we have all the other things like mess and canteen. The food provided over there is quality food with pure oil and everything will be healthy in eating surroundings. Coming to sports and games, we can play as we want and also sta...

reviews.review_heading: It is a very attractive and simple college which provides students many opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very wide, but the way of building in that very small area is truly effective and attractive. The college has many labs, sports courts like volleyball, cricket, tennis, basketball, football, and others.

reviews.review_heading: It organised good events at our time and provided good studies also.
reviews.review_text: There are big classrooms and good equipment in labs. Wi-Fi is available up to the 2nd floor only. The college library contains so many books useful for our studies. The canteen was so good at our times and we only used to be in the canteen in class time also.

reviews.review_heading: Genuine and inside review of DIET.
reviews.review_text: The college facilities and infrastructure were decent. Don't expect any high-class facilities as this was third-tier college. The quality of labs was also decent. Wi-Fi availability was only for management. There was medical room for emergencies. Some sports and games were available. There was decent cricket ground and tennis court. There was no hostel available by this college.

reviews.review_heading: College full of joy and worth the money.
reviews.review_text:
The hostels are not available at at our college but students can stay nearby for college. Both the classroom and lab are also available, which helps you learn practically. The lab contains the Wi-Fi.
And the college gives higher priority to sports and cultural activities.

reviews.review_heading: One the best colleges in Andhra Pradesh.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities available for our course are good. Wi-Fi, better labs, good classrooms and the best central library are there. The facilities in our hostel are very good and very pleasant.
Good food and very good hygiene. Medical facilities are there and sports are there.

reviews.review_heading: A good and better life at DIET.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good and decent. The classrooms are nice and big. High-speed internet is available. Labs are maintained well. The hostel facilities are too good. Clean bathrooms, hygienic food and a neat mess are among the facilities provided. Medical facilities are also available.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Dadi Institute of Engineering and Technology

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Infosys, Accenture, TCS, and many other companies visit our institute to hire students.
The management should increase the placement numbers, And I am feeling happy because I am placed in Navayuga engineering company by the campus in my college.

highlights.summary:
The MAT 2026 Feb session registration is open. For PBT mode, the last date to register is Feb 23, 2026, and the test is scheduled for Mar 1, 2026. Further, for CBT mode, the registration closes on Mar 2, 2026, and the test will be held on Mar 8, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: G.S. College of Commerce offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Com. Whereas, at PG level, G.S. College of Commerce offers courses such as MBA/PGDM and M.Com. GS College Wardha fee structure for all the courses is around INR 2,000 to 89,620.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is pretty good, but it can be much better if they take good care of students.

review_content.Placements: There are great opportunities in our college as top companies come to college. They offer average salary packages. College shows about 100 % placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the library are available in the college itself. There is no free Wi-Fi. But we have enough classrooms. But the hostel is at some distance from the college. Facilities like laptops, cameras, printers, projectors, etc., should be accessible for students. They should be given to them for timely needs. The bandwidth of the college should be able to handle a maximum number of requests.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Computer Applications - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good for knowledge, but there are no placements in our college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of students from our course got placed. I do not know about the salary packages offered to the students. There are not many placements in our college, and about 80% of students are not placed by our college. Our college provides an internship for students who score 90% and above. Top roles are not offered in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides many facilities. It provides free Wi-Fi on campus. It provides a huge ground to play games like basketball, volleyball, and badminton with equipment. There is no hostel facility. Our college has one canteen, and the food served is not so good.

review_summary.college_name: GS College Wardha Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Applications - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of G.S. College of Commerce.

content.Placements: In our course, approximately 120 students get admission. The salary offered is Rs.30,000 per month. It is based on your knowledge and experience. Almost all IT companies require computer engineers and software developers. Almost 70-80% of students get internships at top IT companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good classrooms. The environment is very good. Every classroom has a projector. The seating area is quite large. The canteen is excellent. They can provide good-quality food to students. Wi-Fi is installed, but not for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college has really good faculty members, teaching quality and sports activities.

content.Placements: It is one of the colleges of commerce in Nagpur. 100% placements are provided. Honours and finance and accounting courses are available. Bajaj Finance, Tata Motors-like companies recruited 90% of students. Teachers are good. MBA course is also available.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a library and computer classes for students. The reference section is the best part of our college, where students can go and study in a peaceful environment. The classrooms are good. Sports activities are conducted for students to freshen up.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is pretty good, but it can be much better if they take good care of students.

content.Placements: There are great opportunities in our college as top companies come to college. They offer average salary packages. College shows about 100 % placements.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the library are available in the college itself. There is no free Wi-Fi. But we have enough classrooms. But the hostel is at some distance from the college. Facilities like laptops, cameras, printers, projectors, etc., should be accessible for students. They should be given to them for timely needs. The bandwidth of the college should be able to handle a maximum number of requests.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Applications - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good for knowledge, but there are no placements in our college.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students from our course got placed. I do not know about the salary packages offered to the students. There are not many placements in our college, and about 80% of students are not placed by our college. Our college provides an internship for students who score 90% and above. Top roles are not offered in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides many facilities. It provides free Wi-Fi on campus. It provides a huge ground to play games like basketball, volleyball, and badminton with equipment. There is no hostel facility. Our college has one canteen, and the food served is not so good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Applications - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is an affordable college.

content.Placements: Students get placed in various companies of their choice. This process starts every year around September in the 3rd semester. Students with a 5.5 CGPA are eligible for this. Companies like FMCG, BFSI, Byju's, Kotak, Delloite, etc., visit for placements. The average salary package offered is around 6.5 LPA, and the highest salary package offered was 18 LPA in the previous year.
content.Infrastructure: There is no negative thing about our college. The infrastructure is good. Our college has a wonderful environment to do various activities. They conduct activities like the medical tests, and physical tests every year.

admission_overview.description: GS College Wardha admissions can either be merit-based or entrance-based. The institution evaluates the score of the candidates in the entrance exams such as MAT for admission to the MBA programme. GS College Wardha offers five courses which includes BCom and MBA. Courses offered here are in affiliation with Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University. Candidates can apply online for their preferred programme or reach out to the admission office for offline admission.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Nagpur for any commerce course.
reviews.review_text: The college has a three-storeyed hostel building with 100 beds. Boys' hostel has a boarding facility. The hostel is only 100 meters away from the main college complex and offers a single/double room facility. The hostel also has an indoor games facility. The library of our college is one of the largest libraries in central India with over 50,000 books. It subscribes to many national/ international journals, periodicals, and magazines. The library has spacious reading and reference rooms. It also...

reviews.review_heading: Best college because faculty members are amazing.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a wonderful infrastructure, big classrooms and beautiful environment. Good parking area, canteen is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is an awesome college. I would recommend joining the BBA department because it is awesome.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are not that good, but as a whole the environment is awesome. The most interesting thing is the hostel is near to the college. All the decisions are taken apparently in a positive way. Classrooms are clean. Food is average, but it is up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I have a fun learning experience here.
reviews.review_text: Students should pay a feasible fee before each examination. Our college provides hostel facility next to the college premises. Our college also conducts sports activities for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for both entertainment and studies.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided here are excellent, and the infrastructure for our course is also good. Wi-Fi facility is available throughout the campus, and the labs are fully furnished. Classrooms are excellent, and the library is also huge. You will like it and is available for all students. The food served in the canteen is also great, and sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty and placements are good. Only the infrastructure needs to be improved.
reviews.review_text: There are clean and tidy classrooms. The library is equipped with full of books to read about the course and other areas. Infrastructure needs a lot of upgradation. Still, the campus environment was good. There was no hostel in our college, and the students were mostly day scholars and not hostelers.

reviews.review_heading: Good commerce college in Wardha.

My college has more facility like Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, and library. My college hostel is very clean, and more food is available. 
Canteen, medical, sport and games facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of G.S. College of Commerce.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms were very old. The food in the canteen was not good. The infrastructure was not good. The playground was not good. The main gate was closed all the time.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of computer lab.

overview_faqs.question: Is Gautam Group of Colleges a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Gautam Group of Colleges is a distinguished institution offering MBA/PGDM, M.Sc, PG Diploma, M.A, BCA, B.Sc. (Post Basic), B.Sc, B.Com, B.A, BHM, BBA, B.Pharma, UG Diploma, D.Pharma. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Business & Management Studies, Science, IT & Software, Humanities & Social Sciences, Nursing, Accounting & Commerce, Hospitality & Travel, Medicine & Health Sciences field. Gautam Group of Colleges is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Gautam Group of Colleges has received an impressive review rating of 4 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 3.5 for Campus Life, 4.5 for Placements, 3.5 for Faculty, and 3.5 for Infrastructure.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied to take admission in this college and this profession #shiksha har cheej me chupi hai

content.Placements: For the admission in my college therw is no need of any percentage but students qualify the entrance exam to take admission. Almost 1 Lacs are the average package and the highest are not more than 3lakh Right now I don't know about the company which is top. But yes kind or small companies came for intervening the Student .
content.Infrastructure: Let me tell the honest review the infrastructure is too good of my college. If any students want to SEE they realised that this is the proper infrastructure But I don't think so the good in hostel are good There is no hygiene in the hostel No water filtration .

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members.

content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 22 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Infosys, etc. Many top companies visit our college to recruit students. Top roles offered are data scientist and software developer.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides us with all the facilities. Wi-Fi facility is available in labs. Labs are good. The infrastructure of our college is good. Classrooms are good. The food served in the mess is average. The hostel facility is not available for boys. We have to stay in PGs. They provide sports facilities. The library is not good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college because of its facilities and hostel service.

content.Placements: This was a private college. Almost 85% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered was 30 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies, like Industrial Area Baddi and pharmaceutical companies, visited our campus. Almost 80% of students got internships at Google and Samsung. Our college provided excellent education.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provided many facilities. Wi-Fi, a biochemistry lab, a testing practical lab, and a library were available. The quality of the food in the hostel was average. Medical facilities were available.

The institute offers UG courses for 42 months - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 1 year - 2 years.

highlights.summary: The KMAT Kerala 2026 first session application window is now closed for SCM Hub admission to the MBA course. The exam for the same will be conducted on Feb 22, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, SCM Hub offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from stream like Business & Management Studies. College offers B.Com and BBA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM. The SCM Hub course fee ranges between INR 70,000 to 2,50,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Logistics Management and Supply Chain Management - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: SCM hub is the best in logistics studies in Kerala let alone in India.

review_content.Placements: Well reputed companies visit the college to recruit the students. You can also get placed if you perform well on the internships. Our senior batch students had been interviewed by a reputed company and one got placed with the high salary. The companies from the Gulf and other countries are visiting the college for conducting interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: The SCM hub is an educational institution. Not a big college with a lot of acres of building and land. The SCM hub is only focusing on the practical aspects of the logistics, which they are undisputed leader. There is just a single floor building which is air-conditioned.

faqs.answer: A:    There are a total of 120 seats available in MBA course at Hallmark Business School. Students are offered seats in MBA programme based on their TANCET scores. review_content.Placements: Placements at HBS were outstanding, with recruiters like City Union Bank, Bandhan Bank, Berger Paints, AK Capital, Oppo, and Vijay Dairy visiting the campus. The average package for our batch (2021-2023) was around 4 LPA, and the highest package was 8 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Well-equipped modern classrooms with projectors, good Wi-Fi, a well-maintained library and computer lab, hygienic restrooms, and a green campus made HBS a great place to learn and grow. The food and snacks provided at the mess were of the best quality and taste. The hostel was spacious with all the required facilities.

reviews_list.review_title: An excellent B-school in Trichy.

The placement process is going in a good manner. In our college, there is a separate department for placements named as "Centre for Career Development (CCD) ".
review_content.Infrastructure: A very good infrastructure with a peaceful environment that facilitates the students to enjoy the learning. A campus filled with the natural environment, air-conditioned classrooms, smart classes teaching methodology, a learning resource centre and one computer lab. These all facilities make every student to gain knowledge, and they groom themselves.

faqs.question: Q: What is the TANCET cutoff for Hallmark Business School?

faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission at Hallmark Business School under the Government Quota need to pass TANCET. Aspirants can get admission under the Management Quota based on CET Consortium of Self Financing Professional, Arts and Science Colleges in Tamil Nadu. Aspirants who have passed TANCET are offered a seat via single-window counselling at the Government College of Technology, Coimbatore. Once selected, aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get a seat at Hallmark Business School?

faqs.answer: Yes, candidates need to pass TANCET to get admission in Hallmark Business School MBA. Candidates with a valid TANCET score can participate in the counselling round. Aspirants seeking admission under the Management Quota need to pass common Entrance Test conducted by Consortium of Self Financing Professional, Arts and Science Colleges in Tamil Nadu. The test is followed by a group discussion and personal interview round for final admission.
faqs.question: Q: Is entrance exam required for admission at Hallmark Business School?

faqs.answer: TANCET scores are valid for a period of one year. Candidates aspiring for admission in 2023-24 exam session can only use the TANCET 2023 scores for admission. Candidates who wish for an MBA Admission in any of the TANCET participating colleges in 2024-25 batch must appear for TANCET 2024.Irrespective of the 2023 score, DTE Tamil Nadu will not consider the TANCET 2023 scores for 2024 admission. Similarly, candidates planning to apply for MBA Admission in 2025-26 batch, must apply for the TANCET 2025 exam.

review_summary.college_name: Rajaram Shinde College of Engineering, Mandar Education Society Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It has good teaching staff members and good campus.

content.Placements: I did B.E. in Mechanical Engineering course in this college, and I am from 2018 batch. The college does not provide placements for our batch students, so if you want the best placements, then you can search for another college. Students from our course did not get an internship.
content.Infrastructure: For facilities, I would rate 2.5 out of 5 because they need a lot of improvement in the lab section. The college provides Wi-Fi facility on the campus. Quality of the hostel is quite good, but the MBA hostel is awesome. The quality of food served in the mess is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of faculty members.

content.Placements: For our batch, only 2 to 3 companies are offering placements, but not for our course. Overall, hardly 5 to 6 students get placed. Companies offer a salary package of 2 LPA to 2.5 LPA. About 4 students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our hostel is good, but only some facilities are provided like one TV room, some workout machines, solar system, drinking water, etc. The food facility is also good, and also our college celebrates every festival in the hostel. So, management is good here.
content.Faculty: Our teaching staff members are very helpful, qualified and also knowledgeable. All the teachers will maintain a friendly relation with every student, so we all are very attached to them. They all provide the most practical knowledge, which was very helpful to us.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with what I have paid them and what I got from them, and no any issues with them.

content.Placements: Now, I am in studying my final year in the mechanical department. No companies come for placements in this college. This college has fewer facilities as compared to other colleges in Maharashtra. But in my point of view, the fees are also lesser than other colleges. So, if you want to complete your engineering in low fees, then my recommendation would be this college. This college has three courses such as mechanical, computer, and EXTC. The staff of this college are also average.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is big, but not maintained properly. There is no lift facility. The labs are average. The infrastructure of the college is the name of a lens. There is no Wi-Fi facility. The classrooms are good. The food quality is below average. We didn't face any infrastructure related issue.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good.

content.Placements: The placements are provided to us. The senior batches got selected for companies with the help of placements. Our college places 20% students. The highest package is 40 lacs per annum and the average salary is 2 lacs per annum. Local companies have visited the college. The companies that visited the college are TechnoGrowth, Amazon, etc. The minimum criteria for placement is an aggregate of 60%. Live KT is not allowed.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very beautiful with a very large area. Wi-Fi is provided with the speed of 5 Mbps. The library, medical facility, gym, sports also are available on campus. The quality of labs and classrooms is very bad. The quality of food in the canteen is very poor. The hostel also situated on the college campus. Techfest, Mandar Mahotsav are organised by the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: A below average college for engineering - RSCOE, Chiplun.

content.Placements: If you really care about placement, then this college will be the wrong choice. For the last two senior batches, there was zero percent placement offered from the college. Also, for internship, the college is not helping the students at all. There was no stipend offered to the student from the college placement. Some of the senior students attended placements in nearby colleges but they did not get any offers because they might have priority for their own college students.
content.Infrastructure: I do not know the exact current condition but in my batch, there was no internet facility in the computer labs. The classrooms were okay, not up to the mark. The college building was a little old and not well maintained. Also, the walls were not painted. There was no medical facility. We used to play and arrange sports competitions through our own contribution. We had not got any help from the college management. The canteen was pathetic. The hostel was below average. We had faced a lot of water and electricity issues.
