faqs.answer: A:    Placements for the highest package in PRIST University continuously see its highest offering set at around INR 6.5 LPA (LPA meaning Lakhs Per Annum) which is also stated by several sources. Nevertheless, it should be emphasized that this data is the result of the past year's placement drive and may not even be the highest package-offer for the year 2024. The latest updates about the highest salary package for MBA students going through the process of placement for the 2024 batch can be fou
faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at PRIST University for MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    PRIST University has a good placement record. According to reports more than 80% of students get placed every year. Wipro, Capgemini, Mahindra, TCS, and Sunpharma were the top recruiters who participated in the placement drives. The university has a separate Training Placement cell which provides students help to secure job opportunities. The highest package offered was INR 6.5 LPA, and the minimum package was around INR 1.2 LPA.
faqs.question: Does PRIST University have good placements?

faqs.answer: A:    PRIST University does not have a good placement record. Although the college is a Tier 2 college, they are not that promising.Scope Services, CITI Finance, ABN AMRO Group, Citicorp Finance India Ltd., Bajaj Auto, Delphi-TVS Diesel Systems Ltd., and more were the top companies recruiting from the university.The median salary package provided by the university is INR 3.65 LPA.
faqs.question: How are B.Tech placements at PRIST University?

faqs.answer: A:    Both PRIST (deemed-to-be) University and MSU offer full-time MBA programmes. Talking about the placements, the median pacakge offered during MBA placements at PRIST University was INR 4 LPA in 2023. The median salary package offered to MBA students at MSU ranged from INR 1.3 LPA to INR 1.5 LPA. It can be clearly seen that PRIST University has better placements for MBA students.
faqs.question: Which university offer better MBA placements among PRIST and MSU?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: PRIST University offers full-time BTech, BArch, BA, BCom, BSc, BCA, BBA and BPharm at undergraduate level. Other than regular BTech, the deemed-to-be University offers part-time BTech programme in a number of specialisations. At postgraduate level, it offers MTech, MCA, B.Ed, MA, MBA, MCom, MSc, MOpt and M.Ed as part of academic curriculum. Other than regular UG and PG programmes, PRIST University also offers integrated programmes such as BSc B.Ed and BA B.Ed in the stream of Education, whereas BSc LLB, BBA LLB and BCom LLB programmes.

faqs.answer: A:    At PRIST University, the fees for various courses are as follows :B.Tech- 1.5 L - 8.1 L with 45 percent in graduationMBA- 1.1 L - 2 L along with 50 percent in graduationMsc- 14 K - 48 K with 50 percent in graduationMCA- 65 K and graduation 50 percentB.Ed- 50 K
faqs.question: What is the fees for various courses at PRIST University?

faqs.answer: A:    PRIST University has a fees refund policy that allows students to cancel their enrollment before the start of university classes and receive a full refund of tuition and fees.If a student withdraws during the first week of classes, they will receive a 90% refundif they withdraw during the second week, they will receive a 75% refund.  Third week result will fall in 50% refund,During the fourth week, a 25% refund is given.After the fourth week, no refund is provided.
faqs.question: Does PRIST University refund fees?

faqs.answer: A:    Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology course admission are based on entrance or merit-based. The university offers courses, such as BTech, BSc, BBA, MBA, M.Tech etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate and Diploma courses. The university offers more than 20 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Science, Management, etc. The application process at Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology is conducted online or offline.
faqs.question: Can I get into Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    PRIST University MBA tuition fee ranges between INR 1.1 Lacs and INR 2 lakh for the entire course duration. The mentioned fee has been sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. Other components included in the PRIST MBA fee structure are hostel fees, medical insurance, mess and other security deposits, etc.

overview_faqs.question: Does PRIST University refund fees?
overview_faqs.answer: PRIST University has a fees refund policy that allows students to cancel their enrollment before the start of university classes and receive a full refund of tuition and fees.If a student withdraws during the first week of classes, they will receive a 90% refundif they withdraw during the second week, they will receive a 75% refund. Third week result will fall in 50% refund,During the fourth week, a 25% refund is given.After the fourth week, no refund is provided.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth joining Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: As per Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024, the median package offered during BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 4.34 LPA and INR 4 LPA, respectively. Further, a total of 48 students were placed and 4 students opted for higher studies out of total 59 students during MBA placements 2023. Other than this, 159 students were placed and 21 students opted for higher studies out of total 198 students during BTech placements 2023. Students can check the detailed PRIST University placement stats here.

review_summary.college_name: Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of PRIST University - Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology.

content.Placements: The college provides good placements in CSE. A good number of students got placed in my course. The highest package offered is 6 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. The roles offered are associate software engineer, associate system engineer etc. Very few students got internships, but many students got placed in MNCs.
content.Infrastructure: There are computer labs and a library with plenty of books for all branches. Hostel facilities are good for Chennai people. The quality of food is good in the mess. Canteen and medical facilities are available. Sports and games are average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It has good faculty members and facilities, and I am satisfied with the teaching quality and events.

content.Placements: This is the best place to learn something new and get easily placed after graduation. Some of the top recruiting companies visit the campus, and students get placed easily. The college is very good and organises industrial visits for the students of all years.
content.Infrastructure: There are lots of facilities available in the college, like free Wi-Fi, gym, sports, library, classrooms and labs. The canteen provides some modern food and also fast food. The food is very tasty and good. Hostels are available for girls and boys.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: There is a good infrastructure for education.

content.Placements: Roles like application development associate, technical trainee and support engineer are offered in our college. Many companies visit here and recruit students as per their requirement. Students are trained well for placements so that they can easily qualify in interviews.
content.Infrastructure: This college provides the best quality education, along with proper classrooms, practical labs and library. Hostel facilities are good to stay, and there is every facility in the hostel. The hostel is nearer to the transportation location for hostellers to travel.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Nov 2022)- B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Not much satisfied. But satisfied with that college.

content.Placements: College is very good college. One of the best college in thanjavur. Placements is very good. Communication skills is very good. There will be placement training is available in prist college. Among 80 students 50 percent students will be placed every year.
content.Infrastructure: While coming to infrastructure topic. The college is having a very good building named according to engineering departments the strength in the college is also very good having Wi-Fi facilities both in the classrooms and in the hostels. The college is well-equipped with full lab infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Worth the money. If you want to study at medium fee structure in good premises, join this college.

content.Placements: 75% of our seniors got placed in reputed companies, especially from CSE department because IT companies recruited many students. All bio departments like biotech and biomedical students also get placed in India and abroad too.
content.Infrastructure: It is a Wi-Fi enabled campus. Classrooms are non-A/C, but large and environment-friendly. The library has all books related to departments and competitive exams like GATE, etc. Medical facilities are available on campus because there is a medical college on the campus only. Canteen food is good and healthy. The hostel rooms are very good, and it is like an independent home.

placement_report.college_name: Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: PRIST University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2025, the median package offered during BTech and MBA placements 2024 stood at I NR 4.87 LPA and INR 4.8 LPA , respectively. Further, a total of 391 students were placed out of 435 students . Of these 55 belonged to MBA , 92 were from MTech and 244 were part of BTech program. The median salary recorded for MBA during PRIST placements was INR 4.80 LPA.

tables.context: Are there any government jobs that I can seek afte

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing BCom at PRIST University?
faqs.answer: BCom graduates can take up various job roles in the Finance sector of government organisations, such as government bank and regulatory bodies. They are also eligible for competitve exams, such as UPSC, SSC, etc., that lead to various jobs in the government sector. Tabulated below are some of the prospective government jobs for BCom graduates of PRIST University, along with their average salaries: Job Profile Average Salary Bank Probationary Officer (PO) INR 5 LPA to INR 7 LPA LIC AAO INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS Clerk INR 2 LPA to INR 3 LPA RRB NTPC INR 6 LPA to INR 8 LPA SSC CHSL INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS PO INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA Note: The above-mentioned are industry-based average payouts. The actual salary may differ from student to student based on their skills and competency.

faqs.question: Does PRIST University have good placements?
faqs.answer: PRIST University has a good placement record. According to reports more than 80% of students get placed every year. Wipro, Capgemini, Mahindra, TCS, and Sunpharma were the top recruiters who participated in the placement drives. The university has a separate Training Placement cell which provides students help to secure job opportunities. The highest package offered was INR 6.5 LPA, and the minimum package was around INR 1.2 LPA.

faqs.question: How are B.Tech placements at PRIST University?
faqs.answer: PRIST University does not have a good placement record. Although the college is a Tier 2 college, they are not that promising. Scope Services, CITI Finance, ABN AMRO Group, Citicorp Finance India Ltd., Bajaj Auto, Delphi-TVS Diesel Systems Ltd., and more were the top companies recruiting from the university. The median salary package provided by the university is INR 3.65 LPA.

faqs.question: Which university offer better MBA placements among PRIST and MSU?
faqs.answer: Both PRIST (deemed-to-be) University and MSU offer full-time MBA programmes. Talking about the placements, the median pacakge offered during MBA placements at PRIST University was INR 4 LPA in 2023. The median salary package offered to MBA students at MSU ranged from INR 1.3 LPA to INR 1.5 LPA. It can be clearly seen that PRIST University has better placements for MBA students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of PRIST University - Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: There are computer labs and a library with plenty of books for all branches. Hostel facilities are good for Chennai people. The quality of food is good in the mess. Canteen and medical facilities are available. Sports and games are average.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty members and facilities, and I am satisfied with the teaching quality and events.
reviews.review_text: There are lots of facilities available in the college, like free Wi-Fi, gym, sports, library, classrooms and labs. The canteen provides some modern food and also fast food.  The food is very tasty and good. Hostels are available for girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: There is a good infrastructure for education.
reviews.review_text: This college provides the best quality education, along with proper classrooms, practical labs and library. Hostel facilities are good to stay, and there is every facility in the hostel. The hostel is nearer to the transportation location for hostellers to travel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by Centre for Distance Education, Prist UniversityReviewed on 26 Aug 2018)
reviews.review_heading: Not much satisfied. But satisfied with that college.
reviews.review_text: While coming to infrastructure topic. The college is having a very good building named according to engineering departments the strength in the college is also very good having Wi-Fi facilities both in the classrooms and in the hostels. The college is well-equipped with full lab infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Worth the money. If you want to study at medium fee structure in good premises, join this college.
reviews.review_text: It is a Wi-Fi enabled campus. Classrooms are non-A/C, but large and environment-friendly. The library has all books related to departments and competitive exams like GATE, etc. Medical facilities are available on campus because there is a medical college on the campus only. Canteen food is good and healthy. The hostel rooms are very good, and it is like an independent home.

reviews.review_heading: Best place for entertainment.
reviews.review_text: Our University was wide enough and had a large warandha. Good environment and nice location to reach. Classroom are neat and clean. We had played a lot. Food quality is not good. Canteen is available. Labs facility available. Wi-Fi connection available. Hostellers are Requested to be safe as snakes and monkeys around you.

reviews.review_heading: Friendly faculty members for Students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is Average, Since it is located in the Highways between Trichy and Thanjavur we can't expect the high-speed internet connection even in our Mobile ! And there is no free Wi-Fi connection, But the computer lab is very good more than 200 computers are available for students in the Computer Lab.

reviews.review_heading: There are poor placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good in the semi-urban area. The classrooms are quite good. They can improve their canteens, and they can introduce new mini canteens, there is only the limited amount of food available, we can't expect good and tasty food here.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of normal teachers and some faculty.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, normal labs, classrooms. The library facility is no more in the east campus, and there are no medical facilities, sports and cultural programmes. There is no infrastructure. No good quality food is available in the canteen, and there are two or three items in the canteen. I don't know about the hostel rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Wasted 4 years of my life in PRIST.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is a big question mark for all the students who studied in this university. To be frank, when I entered the college, the building size was so big, but after entering into it, I was shocked that we don't have current facility and lab facility. Sometimes we do not have even drinking water facility. A road size food shop is better than the canteen inside the college. There are no special events in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Fact about my college review by a last bench student.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility for the students. In my college, we have proper labs and technician, sufficient classrooms, attractive and well-equipped library. We don't have proper medical facilities. The sports performances were quite well. Allowing and conducting zonal Anna university matches. The hostel and canteen food facilities are poor.

reviews.review_heading: Worst college of my life and my career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very huge. There are two to three buildings with four floors. There are 55 classrooms with two fans in each. There is no Wi-Fi facility. There is a huge library. No medical facilities are provided. Sports and games are not encouraged. There is a huge computer lab in the college. The labs and classrooms are of good quality. The canteen food is available, but the quality of food is very bad which spoils students health. The hostel facility is provided for boys ...

reviews.review_heading: Wastage of money, time, and talent.
reviews.review_text: The library of PRIST university is quite big and well-established. The entire campus is covered by high-speed Wi-Fi. There are no medical facilities available in the college. Only very basic first aid box is there. The classrooms are below average. On the wall of classrooms, you can easily find cracks. The college has well-established labs. The computer science lab has 1000 computers and they are fully functional. Other department labs are good enough.T he college has a canteen and it is just av...

reviews.review_heading: Complete dissatisfied due to placement. They teach from the exam's prospective, not for knowledge.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is good.
High-speed Wi-Fi, air-conditioned lab, huge collections of book in the library, first aid facility in MBA block, etc. are available.
2 grounds are there- one for basketball (court) and one common for all activities.

The food quality is best for south Indian people.
Others can't tolerate that food every day.
Hostel facility is good but you have to walk 2 km every day to attend the classes because there is no transport facility inside the campus.
After 8 pm, you can't buy ...

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the placement record, good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered was 10 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 5-6 LPA for the marketing students. Top recruiting companies like ITC, Paytm, HDFC Bank, etc., visit our campus for placements. Almost 100% of students from our course got an internship. A top role offered in our course is the business development manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities available are good for the students. Classrooms are equipped with Wi-Fi facility to run smart classrooms. The library has a good collection of books and magazine for the students. Student can take a book from the library for reading and can take with for a week. Canteen and hostel facilities are available for the student. There is a huge playground for sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The placements, infrastructure and the faculty of the college are awesome.

review_content.Placements: They have 100% placement record because of the fees payment structure of the college as it takes after getting the placements. In that case, when students get placed after getting his 3 months salary, he has to pay the fees. The fees will be 10 times more than his monthly salary. It is mainly for those students who don't have to beg for money and can get an affordable education.
review_content.Infrastructure: Very beautiful infrastructure and greenery environment help you focus on study and feel refresh. My college is also awarded for the best green campus in Greater Noida, continuously three years. The colour of the building is my favourite part. The structure of the building is amazing.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: This college is best suitable for the people who think more economically.

review_content.Placements: Above 85% of the placements are guaranteed in our college. If they failed to place anyone, they don't charge any fee. It is shocked to you but its true. They didn't charge a single rupee for me up to now that is the best thing which was not available in any college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good ambience and very pleasant environment are available which gives peace of mind and happiness to everyone. Their focus is not only on the education system, but also, about greenery in college, and they receive an award for maintaining a good garden. Classrooms are very big with air conditioner facility.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Sunstone eduversity, which has a pay after placement.

review_content.Placements: A pay after placement institute which not only grooms a students personality but provides placement around the globe. Hope no other college has such placement record which is not only providing within the country but also abroad and that too without paying the fee.
review_content.Infrastructure: Honestly speaking, there is no five-star infrastructure as expected by the students before taking admissions. But, you will get everything that are the necessities of a student. I didn't face any difficulties with the infrastructure. Lab, mess, Wi-Fi, everything is available. It has been awarded as the greenest campus in Greater Noida.

admission_overview.college_name: Accman Institute of Management Course Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: Accman Institute of Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Accman Institute of Management admission 2025is open for various courses. The institute offers BBA, BCA and MBA, MTech. The selection criteria is a mix of entrance exams and merit-based as per respective courses. To get admitted to AIM, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The application process atAccman Institute of Managementis conducted online. Read the article to know more aboutAccman Institute of Managementcourse admission2025.

AIM admissions are based on merit or entrance exams. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forAccman Institute of Management courses:
Graduate with a 50% aggregate

Accman Institute of Management admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Accman Institute of Management is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Accman Institute of Management Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. Aspirants looking for course admission can apply at the official website, i.e., https://accmanbusinessschool.in/apply-online-for-bba-mba-and-bca-program/. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute selects candidates based on CAT/XAT/MAT/CUET (PG) etc. scores. However, for BBA and BCA courses, candidates are selected based on merit. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theAccman Institute of Management feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

faqs.answer: The fee range for the MBA programme at Accman Institute of Management is INR 5.2 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. The fee might cover various academic expenses like tuition fees, examination fees, library fees, and other relevant charges. It is important to note that the fee structure is subject to change, and candidates are advised to refer to the official website of the university for the latest and most accurate fee structure.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to MBA course at Accman Institute of Management?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates must have valid entrance exam scores such as CAT/XAT/MAT/CUET (PG) etc. For admission to the MBA course at Accman Institute of Management, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The selection criteria for this course is entrance-based and candidates must pass graduation with a 50% aggregate. The duration of the course is two years.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admissions to PGDM courses at Accman Institute of Management?
faqs.answer: The eligibility requirement for admission to the PGDM course at Accman Institute of Management is that candidates must complete their bachelor's degree. Moreover, the selection process required the valid scores fromCAT/XAT/MAT/ATMA.Once candidates get shortlisted on the basis of these scores, they are required to appear in GD and PI. Moreover, the provision of direct admission is not explicitly mentioned on the official website of the institute.

faqs.question: How to get a seat for admission at Accman Institute of Management?
faqs.answer: To secure a seat at Accman Institute of Management, students can check the following steps presented below:Visit the official website and complete the online application process.Ensure eligibility and selection criteria for UG and  programs.The selection criteria is entrance-based.Upon selected, pay the specified fee to confirm and secure your seat.

faqs.question: Can I get into Accman Institute of Management without appearing in any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: The institute offers BBA, BCA and MBA, MTech. The selection criteria is a mix of entrance exams and merit-based as per respective courses. AIM's selection criteria for the MBA course are based on CAT/XAT/MAT/CUET (PG) etc. However, for rest of the UG courses, i.e., BBA and BCA are based on merit.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to various courses at Accman Institute of Management?
faqs.answer: Accman Institute of Management admissions are entrance-based or merit-based. The institute offers BBA, BCA and MBA, MTech. The selection criteria is a mix of entrance exams and merit-based as per respective courses. To get admitted to AIM, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The application mode is online. Aspirants looking for course admission can apply at the official website. Selected candidates must keep their educational documents ready for verification purposes.

faqs.question: Is Class 12 score enough for admission at Accman Institute of Management?

review_summary.college_name: NGF College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Digital Marketing - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied by this college.

content.Placements: There is less no placements in this college, and the average package for this course is 2 LPA. There are few students get internships from this college. This college is not good at giving placements to students, they only want to earn money.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is not available on the campus. Classrooms are maintained, but they charge a high money for attendance. The hostel facilities are not much good, and the food quality in the mess and canteen is not good, with charges high prices. The medical facilities are available in the college.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Digital Marketing - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The worst decision of my life was to take admission in this college.

content.Placements: On average, only 15-20% of students get placed, and they leave their jobs after a few months. The highest package is around 6-7 LPA. Very few students get that much package. The lowest is around 2-3 LPA. I don't know much about the companies, but all of them are from nearby. Around 40-50% of students get internships in nearby companies. Generally, we get jobs in sales, marketing, and supply chain management.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not so good. The front side of the building looks good, but the back side doesn't match the outside. There is no access to Wi-Fi or labs and nearly no classes. The library is almost full of old books. The canteen is the worst part of this college always, dirty with sticky benches, and expired food is sold. They do not take expired food back once it is opened. Sports facilities are zero, and there is no equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of placements and campus life is boring.

content.Placements: Placement possibilities are very less in this college. Only 10-20% of students might get placements from college otherwise students have to search for jobs and internships by themselves. Also for students who got placements, the highest package must be around 2-3 LPA. For electrical engineering, only a single company came for recruiting during the placement drive.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is below average. It is smaller than other colleges compared to other colleges of the same fee structure. Wi-Fi is included in fees as an internet fee, but the internet is provided to students on campus. But labs are pretty much better but the equipment must be upgraded and repaired. Sports teachers or DPs are supportive. Tournaments are held frequently over time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college should provide good companies in our college for recruitment.

content.Placements: Students who score a minimum of 70 marks in academics get placed. The salary package offered is overall 1 lakh for 6 months. Industries notice if students work hard or not when they work hard they will maximise the salary of students. Industries test the students.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good. The canteen is not good, and the quality of serving food is very bad. Wi-Fi is not worth it. Labs are good but some labs are very old. The library is so good. The librarian is very humble and good in nature. The park is so good because there is so much neat and clean grass there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college faculty, labs, and placements.

content.Placements: This year, only 11 companies came for placement, and all the companies were only for sales. All companies came from Palwal and Faridabad; no one came from Delhi, Gurugram, or any software company. The highest package is around 2.5 to 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: I am a student of B.Tech CSE, and in the lab, most of the computers are outdated. Even these software don't support VS Code, and some computers are not working properly. Even after repeated complaints to the faculty, there is no response. The college provides full Wi-Fi across the campus, but you can only use 25 MB per day if you are lucky. About the library, only older-generation books are available.

The library also subscribes to more than 106 national and 42 international journals and periodicals. The  library is member of DELNET (Development Library Network Membership), CSI (Computer Society of India), ICC (Indian Cryogenics Council) and ILA (Indian Library Association).

hostel.description: The hostel has separate wings for boys and girls. The hostel rooms are spacious, airy, well lighted and fully furnished. All basic amenities are provided including a 24 hrs electricity supply, clean water and indoor as well as outdoor creation facilities.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Squash Court, Tennis Court, Table Tennis Court, Volleyball Ground, Billiards Table, Shooting Range, Athletic Tracks, Golf

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Language Lab, Fluid Mechanics Lab, Kinematics of Machine Lab, Basics of Mechanical Engineering Lab, Advanced Thermal Lab, Data Structure and Algorithm Lab, Advance Java Lab, Design and Circuit Lab, Analog Electronics Circuit Lab, Surveying Lab, Concrete Lab, Power Electronics Lab, Power System Lab, Communication Skills Lab, Weaving Lab, Textile Testing Lab, Pattern Making Lab

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied by this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not available on the campus. Classrooms are maintained, but they charge a high money for attendance. The hostel facilities are not much good, and the food quality in the mess and canteen is not good, with charges high prices. The medical facilities are available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The worst decision of my life was to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so good. The front side of the building looks good, but the back side doesn't match the outside. There is no access to Wi-Fi or labs and nearly no classes. The library is almost full of old books. The canteen is the worst part of this college always, dirty with sticky benches, and expired food is sold. They do not take expired food back once it is opened. Sports facilities are zero, and there is no equipment.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of placements and campus life is boring.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is below average. It is smaller than other colleges compared to other colleges of the same fee structure. Wi-Fi is included in fees as an internet fee, but the internet is provided to students on campus. But labs are pretty much better but the equipment must be upgraded and repaired. Sports teachers or DPs are supportive. Tournaments are held frequently over time.

reviews.review_heading: The college should provide good companies in our college for recruitment.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good. The canteen is not good, and the quality of serving food is very bad. Wi-Fi is not worth it. Labs are good but some labs are very old. The library is so good. The librarian is very humble and good in nature. The park is so good because there is so much neat and clean grass there.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college faculty, labs, and placements.
reviews.review_text: I am a student of B.Tech CSE, and in the lab, most of the computers are outdated. Even these software don't support VS Code, and some computers are not working properly. Even after repeated complaints to the faculty, there is no response. The college provides full Wi-Fi across the campus, but you can only use 25 MB per day if you are lucky. About the library, only older-generation books are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a great platform for you.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure arefabolus. All facility members are available at all times. The hostel facilities are divided into girls hostels and boy hostels. For food mess and canteen are available with all types of food are available veg and non-veg, etc.

reviews.review_heading: This college can't give you college experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The college spreads over 27 hectares of land but feels boring after some time. The Wi-Fi is so bad that you can't even text anyone. Labs are quite good and well maintained, but they don't allow students to use the labs in their free time. Hostel is good according to the fee they charge. The mess is also good, but the college canteen is very bad. The stuff here has no taste. It just feels that I wasted my money every time when I eat from the college canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Not completely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not as good as it should be but not so bad that students can not learn anything interesting, and cooperative students definitely can study here. The library of this college is quite good and there is always a rush in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend not to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this campus is not in good condition. The facility is also not good. The campus have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, canteen, and stationary. The facility of hostel is above average. The hostel rooms have AC rooms and non AC rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is the main problem and also placements arecnot satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: There is no wireless fidelity for students and labs also have poor infrastructure whereas library is satisfactory and classroom are also average. I am at the last year of my college and I didn't SEE any sports activity whereas food is quite good in the canteen and I didn't know about medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with my college because it lacks good faculty.
reviews.review_text: From my perspective, the infrastructure is below average. Labs and classrooms are averagely maintained, and Wi-Fi is not available in all the labs. Additionally, a significant number of computer systems do not function properly. The quality of food in the mess is average, and the sports facilities in our college are below par.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is not that good. Below-average infrastructure. Wi-Fi is not available in every classroom; only specific rooms are arranged with Wi-Fi facilities. Labs are not that developed. The library is quite good. Classrooms are big enough to hold like 100 students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and good placements in 2021.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available for all students; labs are available for all students; classrooms are also available for all students; the library is also free and available for all students; and in the library, all types of books that refer to different departments are available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because this college has no placement and no facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in this college, and the internet connectivity is very poor. Labs are available in different branches. The hostel's facilities are standard, such as a common room with no extra amenities for guests, and the food quality is average.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities and infrastructure available for our course. There is a good Wi-Fi network and many labs. Different subjects have different labs. Library is also very good. Sports facility is also available. Medical facilities are also available.

college_info.college_name: Jagran Lakecity University powered by Sunstone: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Jagran Lakecity University powered by Sunstone is a private institute, established in 2013 in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. Jagran Lakecity University powered by Sunstone offers a total of 11 courses at UG and PG levels in 2 specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning and Computer Science Engineering. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA, BCA and BBA in Full Time mode. Jagran Lakecity University powered by Sunstone fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 2,05,000 to 3,95,000. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

review_content.Placements: In my college 80% students got placed. The highest package they're offered is 5,00,000 per annum and the lowest package they're offered is 2,50,000 per annum. 90% of students in my college get internships from top companies. We even get a stipend there.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of my college are amazing and beautiful. There are 15 buildings or more in total. It also includes a library, gym, indoor sports room, 3-4 sports grounds for every sport, 5-6 auditoriums, hostel, mess and 3 canteens. The quality of food in the mess is also good.

review_content.Placements: There were almost 90 students, and only 10 got placed; the highest package was 2-3 LPA; there were only small startup companies. Only 30% of students got internships. Only sales and marketing roles were offered. Campus placement faculty is quite rude, and it's an honest scam game in the placement cell.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, the environment is so calm and peaceful, and we have great food options in the canteen of good quality. Hostel facilities are quite expensive but they are really good. JLU provides sports opportunities at the national level. It's better to learn skills throughout.

admission_process.title: Jagran Lakecity University powered by Sunstone Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Jagran Lakecity University powered by Sunstone admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingEngineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software.Jagran Lakecity University powered by Sunstoneadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asISC, Karnataka 2nd PUC, and CBSE 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 2,05,000 - 3,95,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. review_summary.college_name: Institute of Management and Rural Development Administration Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2013

content.Other: IMED is considered among the oldest Business institution. It has prime location and easily accessible to other parts of city. Talking about infrastructure, it has good infrastructure and sports facilities. Academic quality is good and teachers are well versed with subject’s knowledge. Placements scenario can be little disappointing being a business institution, as they manage to place 60- 70% students but on the other hand, I can't say it is the problem from the side of college authority, it happens mainly because students are not that skilled. Finally, I would say it is a good institution to be a part of.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with placements.

content.Placements: Students with additional skills or job experience have a better chance of being placed. The salary package offered is 2 LPA to 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Tata, Shikuyaa, Kotak Bank, etc., visit our campus.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and computers are available for BBA and MBA. Our college has excellent infrastructure. The hostel, mess, and medical facilities are not available. The private sector provides hostel facilities which are paid services.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is value for money, and all the teachers are very kind and helpful.

content.Placements: Nearly 60-70% of students got placed in some of the leading companies. The average salary offered to students was 2.4 LPA. The topmost recruiting companies are Airtel, Amazon.com, Bajaj Finserv, BHEL, Birla SunLife, Dell, Godrej, Grofers, HDFC Bank, ICICI Securities, ITC, Karvy Consultants, Emphasis, Nestle, Piramal Healthcare, Serco, TCS, Wipro, Zensar Technologies etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi open to everyone in the college, and the speed is above 100 mbps. The campus is not huge, as the college is mostly academic-oriented. We have sports events annually. Medical facilities are available. An advanced library is available. The classrooms and computer labs are great.

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Great Infrastructure and Facilities.

content.Placements: Wipro and Tata consultancy Services arrived our college. And they have placed 4 people from our college and senior batch. Average salary offered was 20,000/month My girl senior was placed in Tata Consultancy services was offered 19,500/Month.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi open to everyone in the college and the speeds are above 4mbps. Not a big Campus surrounding as college is mostly Academic based. We have Sports events annually medical facility is available advanced library Great classrooms andComputerl Labs.

highlights.summary: Established in 2009, Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth is a private institute in Pune, Maharashtra. At the PG and Certificate levels, the institute offers 9 courses across 3 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth programs include MBA/PGDM, PG Diploma, MHA and Certificate. Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth courses are provided in several streams including Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 105 students. The fees at Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth ranges between INR 30,000 to 3,30,000 for the different courses. Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth placements are vibrant, with the average median salary standing at around INR 4,48,000. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth offers diverse programmes at PG and Certificate levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the PG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as MBA/PGDM, PG Diploma and MHA. Whereas, at Certificate level, Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth offers courses such as Certificate. Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth fee structure for all the courses is around INR 30,000 to 3,30,000.

review_content.Infrastructure: My college KIMR has a great infrastructure with a beautiful lush and green lawn. College has it's auditorium in which seminars, guest lectures and sessions are conducted. Our classroom have a smart TV board that has a build-in android and windows which is used as a teaching aid for PPT's, video and learning exposure. College has a huge library with journals, academic books, business magazines and digital library which has a good collection of e-books. We are provided entrepreneur exposure by our teachers under Incubation center. We have a hobby and recreation club under which each child is encouraged to follow the passion and learn from fun game such as team building, management quiz in the college premises.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am very much satisfied with this institute.

review_content.Placements: JSPM's KIMR is an old college, and every year, almost admissions will be filled. Our college is located nearby Kharadi IT Park (EON Zone), and placements in this college are good. Students get placed in good companies. All students do internships in good companies as it is a part of the course curriculum. The salary package offered to students varies from company to company, but there are excellent opportunities to get placed. Students get placed with management trainee positions in different companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a girls hostel, canteen, playground, gym and RO drinking water. It also has an excellent and speedy Wi-Fi facility and smart digital boards for learning purposes. There are an ambulance and dispensary for medical facilities. The food served in the canteen is excellent, and our college has ATM and bank facility. Our college provides pick up and drop bus facility from different parts of the city.

admission_overview.college_name: Kautilya Institute of Management and Research Course Admission 2025: Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: JSPM's Kautilya Institute of Management and Research Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: JSPM's Kautilya Institute of Management and Research admission 2025(enquiry form) is available on the official website.JSPM KIOMRoffers MBA courses at the PG level. Candidates looking for admission should have valid national-based entrance exam scores such as MAT/XAT/GMAT/CAT/CMAT/ATMA/MAH CET forJSPM's Kautilya Institute of Management and Researchcourses. The college is affiliated withSPPU. The mode of application is online.

To get admission at JSPM KIOMR candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. Students should have valid national-based entrance exam scores such as MAT/XAT/GMAT/CAT/CMAT/ATMA/MAH CET for MBA course admission. CheckJSPM's Kautilya Institute of Management and Research selection criteriafrom the table presented below:

JSPM's Kautilya Institute of Management and Research admission process includes online application submission, and application scrutiny by the admission committee. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in JSPM KIOR:
STEP 1: JSPM's Kautilya Institute of Management and Research Pune Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the college. Candidates need to pay an application fee to complete the application procedure.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

JSPM's Kautilya Institute of Management and Research Pune shortlists candidates based on national-level entrance exams such as MAT/XAT/GMAT/CAT/CMAT/ATMA/MAH CET. The college will display a provisional merit list. Students can checkJSPM's Kautilya Institute of Management and Research cutoffdetails here.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the college releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee.

faqs.question: What are the career prospects after completing MBA from JSPM's Kautilya Institute of Management and Research?
faqs.answer: Majoritily, prospects after an MBA can based on your specialization, industry, and individual preferences. Generally as of a MBA postgraduate includes your role as consulting, finance, marketing, operations head. You can get a opportunity to be a leader in a association or human resource manager working in diverse sectors. MBA can enhance your leadership and networking qualities .Also a benefit in career prospect is that you could have entrepreneurship knowledge to start ta business.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at JSPM's Kautilya Institute of Management and Research?
faqs.answer: The institute has a good placement record and is affiliated to Savitribai Phule, Pune University. The institute's Training & Placement Cell provides Soft Skills Development Program, Preparatory Courses, and other training programs to help students become competent and professional. The Placement Department imparts training to the students to develop overall personality of the students to be able to equip them for facing the Campus Interviews in this new competitive era. The thrust of the Placement Department is to create maximum opportunities for the placement of the eligible students in the job market by establishing good rapport with the Industry. The Placement activity starts immediately after first semester examination i.e. for internship of first year students. Many of the top and renowned Companies visit to our institutes regularly for campus as well as off- campus Recruitment Process & most of the students get placed even before the completion of course.

college_info.intro:
Some of the popular programmes offered at RIMT University include BTech and MTech. For BTech admissions, students must have passed Class 12 exam with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one among Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject with at least 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category students) in all subjects taken together.
On the other hand, for MTech course, students must have a bachelor’s degree in Engineering or equivalent in the relevant field with at least 50% aggregate (45% in case of reserved category candidates). Students can check the RIMT University popular programmes in the table provided below:

placements.overview: At RIMT University, the dedicated Placement Cell takes charge of all placement-related matters for students across departments. Students can check the RIMT University placement statistics in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    The RIMT university's placement cell is said to be cooperative and has a decent placement rate. Further, the university claimed that it has recorded 100% placements during the recent placement drive. Apart from this, as per the Management NIRF reports 2024  the median package offered during RIMT University MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 4.57 LPA. However, to be very precise there is no such thing as a 100% placement guarantee, students can get placement opportunities from the university'
faqs.question: Does RIMT University provide 100% placements for MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    RIMT University has a placements cell that takes charge of all placement-related matters for students across Management departmentt. The cell aims to align recruiter expectations with the aspirations of MBA students, ensuring a mutually beneficial placement experience. Some of the top recruiters, mentioned at RIMT University's official website are: Bajaj Capital Bank of America Amazon Pay IBM Tata Consultancy Services HDFC Bank
faqs.question: Which companies recruits MBA graduates from RIMT University?

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
RIMT University offers over 250 UG, PG, diploma and doctoral courses to the students across various fields such as Engineering, Science, Management, Agriculture, Design, Pharmacy, Health Science, Education, Arts and Humanities, Computer & IT and Commerce & Accounting, among others. For admission, candidates are required to meet with the minimum eligibility criteria set by the University.

Majority of the UG courses have a duration ranging between three to five years and for most of the PG courses, the duration is two years. Students can check the RIMT University courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

faqs.question: Is RIMT University hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    XAT 2025 was held on the first Sunday of January 2025, which was January 5. The exam dates had been officially announced by XLRI Jamshedpur on July 15, 2024, by the XATONLINE website. The exam was conducted in 72 cities from 2 pm to 5:30 pm. The registration process continued until the first week of December 2024.Online application submission only. XAT fee is INR 2,200 for all candidates. Fee to be submitted at the time of application form submission Graduation degree must for filling the XAT form (final-year candidates can also apply).

faqs.answer: A:    The basic eligibility criteria required to get admission into BTech courses at RIMT University, are mentioned below: For BTech (with all the above-mentioned specialisations), a student must have passed Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects with any one subject between Chemistry/Biology/Biotechnology/Technical Vocational subject with minimum 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category students) in all the subjects taken together.For BTech - Lateral Entry (All Branches), students who have passed three year Diploma in Engineering are eligible for Lateral Entry (Join third semester of the programme).The tuition fees for BTech courses range from INR 3.8 lakh to INR 8.3 lakh depending on the specialisation.

reviews_list.review_title: A brief review of RIMT University.

review_content.Placements: Around 10% of students were placed from our course. The highest package offered was about Rs. 80000 per month in our course. Recruiting companies are diagnostic centers. Around 100% of students secured internships in different hospitals in their areas.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure like best furniture, 24/7 power supply, projectors in classrooms, one best library for every department. In hostels, beds, table chairs, almirah, Wi-Fi, and cooler/air-conditioners in each were placed. Facilities in hostel mess were excellent like good quality food, a good lighting system, and also the canteen food was the best. There was a multi-specialty hospital for students as well as the local public. In sports, almost every games were played in different places inside the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied by this institute. Well maintained infrastructure, well educated faculty.

review_content.Placements: Very few placements are provided by this university. This university offers less exposure, but it provides various industrial visits, which may help you get placed independently. There are many extracurricular activities that students should be involved in for overall development.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many libraries in this institution. Knowledge is key to success, and interested students can easily get it through this university year-round. Wi-Fi is not provided. Classrooms are well-maintained with air conditioning and curtains. It is a good institute to socialize.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc in Operation Theatre and Anaesthesia Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: RIMT University is the best university in India.

review_content.Placements: There were at least 40% placements which happened on the campus earlier, so that was just a beautiful initiative that took place on the campus. So the highest packages were - 2 lakhs LPA, low packages were like 1 lakh. Roles given by the company were operation theatre technician as well as anesthesia management.
review_content.Infrastructure: If I would talk about the infrastructure of the campus, that would be like we have a very unique experience there, like they had their own multi-specialty hospital on the campus as well. Emergency services were available, as well as the department was something which was way amazing.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses offered by RIMT University?
overview_faqs.answer: The RIMT University is UGC-approved and is accredited by the AICTE, Bar Council of India, Pharmacy Council of India, and Council of Architecture for its wide range of courses.Fees for various courses offered as follow-ups:For B.Sc. it offers 43 courses with the total tuition fees 2.8 L- 4.7 L and for M.Sc. it offers 33 courses total tuition fees for this course ranges from 1.4 L- 3.5 L. 4 courses are in B.Pharm with the total tuition fees 3.5L-5L And for B.E/B.Tech the fees is 3.7L-6.4L.Total tuition for UG Diploma is 39k - 1.4L and for BA.LL.B it is 5.3L . For B.A . 15 courses is available with total tuition fees 1.4 L-3.1L and for BPT is 4.2L.10 courses are in BBA and tatal fees for this course is 2.9L-4.2L.You can see fee structure for more courses at https://www.shiksha.com/university/rimt-university-punjab-other-25191/courses

review_summary.college_name: RIMT University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college and day by day, they are improving the quality of the college.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of students were placed in my course. The lowest package was 4.1 LPA and the highest was 7.1 LPA. Almost 90% of students got internships in my course. Supervisor and manager roles were provided to the students, and many students got posts in the same college after getting a good degree from the same college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, good classrooms, and a library were available. Good hostels and good food were served there. Many activity areas were available. RO water was available. ACs and coolers were also available. A good internet connection was set up for us so we could study well. Every class projectors were placed.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My best college in the world.

content.Placements: Above 50 students were placed in my course. The highest package was 12 LPA, and the lowest package was 4 LPA. All top companies like Intel, and so many local companies hired students. 50% of students got internships at Intel. Role offered was a corporate lawyer in a firm.
content.Infrastructure: College provided all necessary facilities to students like free Wi-Fi, computer and science labs, proper classrooms, and different libraries for every department. Hostel provided healthy food to the hostler. It also provided good rooms and washrooms for all.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Radiology and Imaging Technology (MRIT) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: A brief review of RIMT University.

content.Placements: Around 10% of students were placed from our course. The highest package offered was about Rs. 80000 per month in our course. Recruiting companies are diagnostic centers. Around 100% of students secured internships in different hospitals in their areas.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure like best furniture, 24/7 power supply, projectors in classrooms, one best library for every department. In hostels, beds, table chairs, almirah, Wi-Fi, and cooler/air-conditioners in each were placed. Facilities in hostel mess were excellent like good quality food, a good lighting system, and also the canteen food was the best. There was a multi-specialty hospital for students as well as the local public. In sports, almost every games were played in different places inside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied by this institute. Well maintained infrastructure, well educated faculty.

content.Placements: Very few placements are provided by this university. This university offers less exposure, but it provides various industrial visits, which may help you get placed independently. There are many extracurricular activities that students should be involved in for overall development.
content.Infrastructure: There are many libraries in this institution. Knowledge is key to success, and interested students can easily get it through this university year-round. Wi-Fi is not provided. Classrooms are well-maintained with air conditioning and curtains. It is a good institute to socialize.

paragraphs: RIMT University has 21 schools that offfer various UG, PG, diploma and PhD programmes in a wide range of specialisations like Management, Health Sciences, Engineering, Computer Science, etc. RIMT University admission 2025 is ongoing for all the courses. Candidates can visit the official webiste of the University and register for the selected course for further admission process. The University considers merit as well as entrance test scores for admission to different courses.
The table below mentions the eligibility and selection criteria for popular RIMT University courses:

A pass in Class 12 exam with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one among Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject with at least 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category students) in all subjects taken together
A pass in Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any stream

Those candidates who have passed their Class 10 along with a three-year Diploma in any trade from Punjab State Board of Technical Education & Industrial Training, Chandigarh or such Examination from any other recognised State Board of Technical Education
Merit-basis

A pass in any bachelor’s degree of minimum three-year duration from a recognised university

faqs.question: What is the admission process of RIMT University?
faqs.answer: Through its various faculties, RIMT University, Gobindgarh offers diplomas, undergraduate and postgraduate programs in engineering, health science, art and design, agriculture, bioscience, nursing, paramedical, computer application, IT, humanities, library science, law, paraveterinary, commerce, management, education, legal studies, journalism, and paramedical.The deatailed admission process of the courses offered by RIMT University is given belowRegistration for admission to RIMT University consists of the following steps:Registration and submission of details via the online admission form is required for diploma, undergraduate and postgraduate courses at RIMT University.The RIMT admission committee shortlists applications based on qualifying marks before preparing the merit list.According to the merit list, candidates need to pay the admission fee in order to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Is RIMT University hard to get?
faqs.answer: No, you can easily took admission in this college. As this is a private college, there are lot of seats available .But for B.Tech you should have given JEE Mains with more than 45% in 12th boards exams.For B.Com, students need 50 % in commerce stream in 12th boards.For BCA, just any students who have completed thier 12th boards can took admissions.College accepts Cbse 12th as well as PSEB 12th .Contact to the college offline or else register your details on their website, you can easily get a seat in this college

placement_report.college_name: RIMT University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: RIMT University Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: The overall highest package offered during RIMT University placements stood at INR 30 LPA . Further, RIMT University has recorded 100% placements during the recent placement drive. Apart from this, as per the Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024 , the median package offered during RIMT University BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 3.34 LPA and INR 4.57 LPA , respectively. Earlier, according to the NIRF report 2023, 46 BTech and 7 MBA students were placed during RIMT University placements 2022. Further, the median package offered to BTech and MBA students during 2022 placements was INR 2.2 LPA and INR 2.04 LPA, respectively. Earlier, the highest package offered during RIMT University placements 2021 stood at INR 43 LPA . Moreover, more than 600 companies visited the campus during RIMT University placements 2021.

The university has released the Engineering and Management NIRF report 2023 that incorporates 2022 placement statistics for respective courses. Click on the below link to download the RIMT University placement data 2022:

faqs.question: How was placement at RIMT University?
faqs.answer: The NIRF ranking at RMIT University is way below at 169 out of 171 across India. All recruiters keep track of this and then only select students. As a result, the median salary package is around INR3L. In addition, considering the total number of students studying across different courses and those who opt for placement, this institution is able to place very less number of students. If you are intending to take admission based on this criteria then better skip this place. To help you getting detailed information, I am attaching a link. Please go through this. https://www.shiksha.com/university/rimt-university-punjab-other-25191/placement Best wishes to you.

faqs.question: Which has better placement at RIMT University, BTech or MBA?
faqs.answer: The placement at the Regional Institute of Management and Technology University is generally better for MBA students compared to BTech students. As per the Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024 , the median package offered during RIMT University BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 3.34 LPA and INR 4.57 LPA , respectively. Hence, the placement package offered to MBA graduates is slightly higher than the BTech course. However, according to the reports, the number of BTech students placed is more than the number of graduates placed from MBA courses.

faqs.question: Does RIMT University provide 100% placements for MBA?
faqs.answer: The RIMT university's placement cell is said to be cooperative and has a decent placement rate. Further, the university claimed that it has recorded 100% placements during the recent placement drive. Apart from this, as per the Management NIRF reports 2024 the median package offered during RIMT University MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 4.57 LPA . However, to be very precise there is no such thing as a 100% placement guarantee, students can get placement opportunities from the university's side but, qualifying for the interview rounds, and skills & aptitude test are completely based on students, how they perform in that. Hence, the university is claiming that they offer 100% placements to their MBA students but, to get a job students must prepare themselves.

faqs.question: Which companies recruits MBA graduates from RIMT University?
faqs.answer: RIMT University has a placements cell that takes charge of all placement-related matters for students across Management departmentt. The cell aims to align recruiter expectations with the aspirations of MBA students, ensuring a mutually beneficial placement experience. Some of the top recruiters, mentioned at RIMT University's official website are: Bajaj Capital Bank of America Amazon Pay IBM Tata Consultancy Services HDFC Bank

faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses offered by RIMT University?
faqs.answer: The RIMT University is UGC-approved and is accredited by the AICTE, Bar Council of India, Pharmacy Council of India, and Council of Architecture for its wide range of courses. Fees for various courses offered as follow-ups: For B.Sc. it offers 43 courses with the total tuition fees 2.8 L- 4.7 L and for M.Sc. it offers 33 courses total tuition fees for this course ranges from 1.4 L- 3.5 L. 4 courses are in B.Pharm with the total tuition fees 3.5L-5L And for B.E/B.Tech the fees is 3.7L-6.4L. Total tuition for UG Diploma is 39k - 1.4L and for BA.LL.B it is 5.3L . For B.A . 15 courses is available with total tuition fees 1.4 L-3.1L and for BPT is 4.2L. 10 courses are in BBA and tatal fees for this course is 2.9L-4.2L. You can see fee structure for more courses at https://www.shiksha.com/university/rimt-university-punjab-other-25191/courses

faqs.question: How costly is RIMT University?
faqs.answer: College is charging genuine fees for all courses they provides. College fees for B.Tech is 1.11 Lacs (for 1 st year), B.Sc is 1.04 Lacs (for 1st year), MBA is 1.02 Lacs (1st year fees), Diploma -1.34 Lacs (1st year). Fees of this college is very normal for every course, you can choose this as a option according to fees. College placement is little bit lower, as only 60% of the students gets placement from this college. You can directly took admission in this college .Only for B.Tech, you need more than 60% in 12th boards

faqs.question: What is the application fee for B.A at RIMT University?
faqs.answer: The application fee for the BA programme at RIMT University is INR 580. This fee is non-refundable and must be paid during the online application process. To complete the application, candidates need to visit the university's official admission portal, where candidates have to register with their personal email ID and mobile number.This fee is a crucial part of the application process and is required to finalise aspirants' submission.

hostel_campus.college_name: RIMT University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Rimt provides on-campus accommodation. All rooms are fully furnished; include utilities, Wi-Fi internet connection and meals which are prepared in-house by a chef. The usual dining schedule from Monday to Saturday comprises full breakfast, lunch and dinner, paid laundry facilities are also available. Students get a study desk and chair, chest of drawers, wardrobe, washbasin, and more. There are also adapted rooms in the halls for students with disabilities. Students also have access to computer labs, fitness centres, and swimming pools.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Athletics Track, Yoga Room, Table Tennis Room
