reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college and day by day, they are improving the quality of the college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, good classrooms, and a library were available. Good hostels and good food were served there. Many activity areas were available. RO water was available. ACs and coolers were also available. A good internet connection was set up for us so we could study well. Every class projectors were placed.

reviews.review_heading: My best college in the world.
reviews.review_text: College provided all necessary facilities to students like free Wi-Fi, computer and science labs, proper classrooms, and different libraries for every department. Hostel provided healthy food to the hostler. It also provided good rooms and washrooms for all.

reviews.review_heading: A brief review of RIMT University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure like best furniture,  24/7 power supply, projectors in classrooms, one best library for every department. In hostels, beds, table chairs, almirah, Wi-Fi, and cooler/air-conditioners in each were placed. Facilities in hostel mess were excellent like good quality food, a good lighting system, and also the canteen food was the best. There was a multi-specialty hospital for students as well as the local public. In sports, almost every games were played in different places inside the c...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied by this institute. Well maintained infrastructure, well educated faculty.
reviews.review_text: There are many libraries in this institution. Knowledge is key to success, and interested students can easily get it through this university year-round. Wi-Fi is not provided. Classrooms are well-maintained with air conditioning and curtains. It is a good institute to socialize.

reviews.review_heading: RIMT University is the best university in India.
reviews.review_text: If I would talk about the infrastructure of the campus, that would be like we have a very unique experience there, like they had their own multi-specialty hospital on the campus as well. Emergency services were available, as well as the department was something which was way amazing.

reviews.review_heading: I have spent good quality time in this university, and I learned a lot from this university.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities in our hospital, proper labs, good internet connection, and classrooms are comfortable and in a noise-free area. A library is also available near the department. In the hostel, there are 2-seater and 3-seater rooms. AC and non-AC rooms are both available for students. The quality of food is good in our canteen, and the mess also provides hygienic food. 24-hour medical facility available, and all sports games are played in the university.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college and value for money. Every student should consider taking admission here.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of my course are good. Wi-Fi is also available, labs are well organized, and classrooms are neat and clean. The library is well-maintained. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is good, and the food quality is tasty. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The university is on GT Road and has a very good environment on campus.
reviews.review_text: They provide AC rooms with Wi-Fi. They provide us with books from the labs, and our department is very good and not far from the university's main gate. The department is near the university hospital and close to the entrance of the university.

reviews.review_heading: Really good campus life.
reviews.review_text: We were provided unlimited Wi-Fi, proper tables and chairs, and our own personal lockers in hostels. In our classrooms, there is AC and projectors, so visual learning is provided. Proper breakfast, lunch, snacks and dinner are given in the mess and in the canteen too.

reviews.review_heading: RIMT UNIVERSITY- Regional Institute of Management and Technology .
reviews.review_text:
infrastructure of Rimt university is good but according to me, it can be better if they painted all the departments There are many departments and hostels which are not fully made and painted 
Hostel facilities are not so good, but they can also be better.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure at Rimt and the design.
reviews.review_text: The hostel life in Rimt University is very good. The food quality is mid-range, and the menu of the mess is nearly updated every day. The canteen food is better, and medical as well as sports and other extracurricular activities are also available for the students residing in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment, excellent teaching, and best placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our course are good, like the library, which helps students with their respective subjects. And the classroom is well maintained, cleaned, and decorated. The quality of the hostel is average because in hostels there are hygiene problems that affect students health. And the food quality is average; they provide good food to the students, but some of the students complain that the food is bad for their health. So yes, this is the reason for giving an average rating to the hostel ...

reviews.review_heading: College is normal and the fees is high.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not good. It is average. The classes are not well developed. They are average like high schools. Hostels are very bad. Mess facility and washrooms are very bad. The rooms are not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a top-level university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our classrooms are neat. Our labs are good and decent. The food served in the mess is good and hygienic. Our university has a hospital. Our college has many sports grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for engineering students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the best facilities in the hostel room for students. Wi-Fi facility is available at high speed in our hostel rooms. There is an RJ-45 connector installed for hostelers. The food served in the mess is good compared to other colleges.

In addition to this, it has been rated 4.8 on campuslife, 4.6 on placements, 4.8 on faculty and 4.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: NBN Sinhgad School of Management Studies Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is worth joining this college as the fee is low compared to other colleges.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are very good. Each student can attend a maximum of 40 companies. Last year, the highest salary package offered was 6.5 LPA for MBA students. The T&P head is very supportive. Most of the companies that visited the campus are MNCs. For placements, various activities are conducted by faculty members.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides Wi-Fi facility. Labs are good. Classrooms are spacious. The central library is huge. Students of Sinhgad have free medical facilities at SKN hospital by showing the valid ID card of Sinhgad College. There are many playgrounds. Our college organises an event named Karandak which is the biggest event of any college in Pune includes sports, dance and cultural activities. Quality of food served in the canteen is good. The hostel is very good, and I am living the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the NBN Sinhgad School of Management Studies.

content.Placements: Around 350 companies visit the campus, and all are reputed companies like ITC, britania, coka cola, etc. The college teachers also train personally to individuals to get placed into these companies. Training sessions are there in college on every thursday by experienced persons in the world whose experience adds more knowledge to your life.
content.Infrastructure: Number one infrastructure is provided by the institute which is helpful to the student to polish their personality by taking participation in various extracurricular activities on the campus. The college organises events like Sinhgad Karandak and spectrum event which help you to discover all your qualities. The campus is good, and it is amongst top MBA colleges in Pune.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: For MBA course, the facilities and the placements are good.

content.Placements: The college offers the good placements. In our batch, many students got a package of 3.50 LPA. The college offers great placements of MBA marketing students. There are a huge scope and opportunities for the student. The basic salary offered by the companies is 2.20 LPA. There are many companies visited this college to offer an internship. 50% of the students got an internship, and 80% of the student got placed. The stipend varies from Rs. 5,000 to Rs. 15,000 per month. The students get the different types of jobs from the campus like HR, marketing, finance, IT.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty members, good placement record , really good infrastructure

content.Placements: There is centralised Placement cell in over college and students are given opportunities in Summer Internship program and final placement the centralised placement cell is equipped with various infrastructure to carry out placement enhancing activities like group discussion personal interviews industrial Analytics etc. The highest package offered to NBNSSOMS students is 4. 75 lacs per annum and the average package offered to NBNSSOMS students is 2.6 to 2 lacs per annum from the recent batch student got job at HR manager post in Shoppers Stop for detailed information visit the website www.sinhgad.edu

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college because of the faculty, good placements in the 2016 batch.

content.Placements: Central placement is there in Sinhgad Institutes. Also, a number of companies visit the campus and also the faculty of the college is very supportive of the students regarding the personality development of the students. The placements of our batch are very good. Almost 90% of students were placed in the 2016 batch.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Wi-Fi is available in every part of the campus, labs are very spacious as well as the classrooms. The food quality is fine in the canteens as well as in the mess. Hostel rooms are very neat and clean. Well, I did not face any issues regarding the infrastructure during my tenure at the college.

NBN Sinhgad School of Management Studies has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed minimum three year Bachelor's Degree in any discipline awarded by any of the Universities recognised by UGC or AIU with the above mentioned marks (45% in case of candidates of backward class categories (VJ/DT- NT (A), NT (B), NT (C), NT (D), SBC, SEBC) and PwD belonging to Maharashtra State only) or its equivalent.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, decent placement, good faculty, but the syllabus is outdated.

review_content.Placements: 60% get placed in decent companies. The highest placement was 7.5 LPA, and the lowest was 2.9 LPA. The average placement is about 3 LPA. Top recruitment companies are Mahindra and Mahindra, Godrej, etc. There is no internship program. Software development, DevOps, and analysis are the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the lab and library. The classroom is okay and decent, but not that comfortable. As a day scholar, I don't know the hostel. The canteen is decent, and the turf is good, but they give free passes to play very few times. Turf without a pass is paid.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied because of faculty and good placements. Overall, it is good but not the best, obviously.

review_content.Placements: 50% of students get placed honestly. The lowest package is 1.8 LPA and the highest is 13 LPA. Top recruiters are Infosys, Deloitte, and TCS. Almost everyone does free internships, but very few get paid ones. All roles for every branch are offered, including CS, IT, EXTC, AIDS, Mechanical, and a new branch called Designing, which is trending and getting a good response.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are provided which should be present in an ideal college. The quality of the hostel is average and decent. The hostel is not worth the money. The food is not worth the money at all, as the hostel mess costs nearly lakhs but the food quality is poor.

review_summary.college_name: Terna College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good college and placement cell is also good.

content.Placements: Most of the students from the computer branch are placed in college. But the placement cell is good, and they are trying to place as many students as possible. From our department, only a few students were placed last year. But the overall placement activities are very good in college.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides Wi-Fi in the library for study. Labs are good, but some class work is in progress now. For sports, the college has turf. The sports event is fun for students. I have no idea about the hostel, but the distance of the hostel from the college is very short, so it can be good for the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculty is not good and supportive of students, and placements are not that good.

content.Placements: 30% are placed. 10 LPA is the highest package, 7 LPA is the average, and 2.5 LPA is the lowest. Deloitte, SBI Fintelix recruit. College does not provide an internship, and it also does not support the students in getting an internship. College has so many rules, and they have so much paperwork for an internship. No idea about top roles.
content.Infrastructure: 3/4 PCs are not working in the lab. I don't live in a hostel, but my friend told me that they don't get hygienic food, which is not good to eat. Also, to play sports, they have so many rules, and for that, they charge a fee, but students didn't get to play.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college, decent placement, good faculty, but the syllabus is outdated.

content.Placements: 60% get placed in decent companies. The highest placement was 7.5 LPA, and the lowest was 2.9 LPA. The average placement is about 3 LPA. Top recruitment companies are Mahindra and Mahindra, Godrej, etc. There is no internship program. Software development, DevOps, and analysis are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the lab and library. The classroom is okay and decent, but not that comfortable. As a day scholar, I don't know the hostel. The canteen is decent, and the turf is good, but they give free passes to play very few times. Turf without a pass is paid.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because of faculty and good placements. Overall, it is good but not the best, obviously.

content.Placements: 50% of students get placed honestly. The lowest package is 1.8 LPA and the highest is 13 LPA. Top recruiters are Infosys, Deloitte, and TCS. Almost everyone does free internships, but very few get paid ones. All roles for every branch are offered, including CS, IT, EXTC, AIDS, Mechanical, and a new branch called Designing, which is trending and getting a good response.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are provided which should be present in an ideal college. The quality of the hostel is average and decent. The hostel is not worth the money. The food is not worth the money at all, as the hostel mess costs nearly lakhs but the food quality is poor.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A good college with decent placements.

content.Placements: In our college, specifically in my course, around 70–80% of students are placed. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest is around 2.8 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Capgemini. Roles offered are Software Developer, Analyst, and Power BI.
content.Infrastructure: We have ACs in our labs and projectors in all our classes. The library is fully air-conditioned and has more than 3,000 books. We also have an Apple lab. I live in the hostel, which is on campus. We have two or three sharing rooms, and it is cleaned every alternate day.

description: Terna Engineering College cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Terna Engineering College JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Terna Engineering College cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 116814 and 290341 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 116814, B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 117625.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 116814.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

During the Terna Engineering College cutoff 2025 for MHT CET, the last round cutoff percentiles ranged between 75.19 and 92.42 for B.E. / B.Tech admission in the General HS category. The specialisation that turned out to be the most competitive for admission was B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, with a closing cutoff percentile of 92.42 for the General HS quota. reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi in the library for study. Labs are good, but some class work is in progress now. For sports, the college has turf. The sports event is fun for students. I have no idea about the hostel, but the distance of the hostel from the college is very short, so it can be good for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is not good and supportive of students, and placements are not that good.
reviews.review_text: 3/4 PCs are not working in the lab. I don't live in a hostel, but my friend told me that they don't get hygienic food, which is not good to eat. Also, to play sports, they have so many rules, and for that, they charge a fee, but students didn't get to play.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, decent placement, good faculty, but the syllabus is outdated.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the lab and library. The classroom is okay and decent, but not that comfortable. As a day scholar, I don't know the hostel. The canteen is decent, and the turf is good, but they give free passes to play very few times. Turf without a pass is paid.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of faculty and good placements. Overall, it is good but not the best, obviously.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are provided which should be present in an ideal college. The quality of the hostel is average and decent. The hostel is not worth the money. The food is not worth the money at all, as the hostel mess costs nearly lakhs but the food quality is poor.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with decent placements.
reviews.review_text: We have ACs in our labs and projectors in all our classes. The library is fully air-conditioned and has more than 3,000 books. We also have an Apple lab. I live in the hostel, which is on campus. We have two or three sharing rooms, and it is cleaned every alternate day.

reviews.review_heading: Decent faculty support, average facilities, manageable academics, but needs stronger industry focus.
reviews.review_text: The college has a hostel, a turf, a canteen, and a campus. They have not upgraded the infrastructure in years. Bamboo boards have been there for 1.5 years, and they don't provide passes for playing regularly. Most of the time, we need to pay for playing, but the campus is quite big.

reviews.review_heading: Only cultural fest is good here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working, library is good, gymkhana is there but poor equipments. I don't know that much about hostel because I am non hosteller. There is no internet connectivity on campus. There is no funding for the projects. Classrooms are very old, and not even benches are of proper shape.

reviews.review_heading: Poor management in Terna.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but the canteen is not great. The lab and classroom are decent. Have a few indoor games like carrom, chess, and table tennis. Classroom is good, and a few have AC. Labs are good too, but the mess is not good, very poor, I didn't like it though Wi-Fi is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is decent, not that good, but not that bad either.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, it's not that disappointing. There is no proper ground for this college, instead, there are turfs for the students to play football and cricket. Labs and classrooms are also decent, and the library is the best among the colleges in Mumbai, also because it is very huge and perfect for students to carry out their work without any disturbance. It is one of the best libraries in Navi Mumbai.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers good academic support, decent placements, and improved infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The campus facilities are good. The campus provides Wi-Fi connectivity in academic blocks. The computer department has well-equipped laboratories with high-speed internet, modern PCs, and updated software. Classrooms have comfortable seating and proper ventilation is available. The quality of food is average to good.

reviews.review_heading: Less satisfactory than I had expected before taking admission.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the college is satisfactory. The library and internet facilities are top-notch. Sports and games are good as expected, but I don't know about hostel life as I'm a day scholar. Classrooms are not that clean. The benches are broken and a few of them are well in some departments.

reviews.review_heading: Average college in Navi Mumbai. Placements are good and I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are average, and classrooms are also average. The library is neat and clean. Wi-Fi is available in the library. I do not stay at the college hostel but my friend stays at the hostel. My friend told me that the hotel price to high. If first-year students opt for the hostel, they should compulsorily eat food in the hostel mess. From the second year, students have the freedom to eat anywhere and do not pay for hostel mess. The hostel mess food is not very good. It is less than average.

reviews.review_heading: Unbiased review of Terna Engineering College, Navi Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but not up to the mark. The college lacks a big campus, the same as most colleges in Mumbai. The campus is fully equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi. Labs and classrooms are well-managed and fully technologized. The canteen is also good here, and the outside street food is too good that you must try.

reviews.review_heading: Frankly dissatisfied by faculty, but library and labs are excellent, and placements are average.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are below average, but when you talk about computer labs, auditorium, and library facilities, they are amazing. The only thing about the canteen is that it was average, but the food was below average and not at all tasty, which you can eat or be healthy.

reviews.review_heading: How I see- Terna Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Classrooms are well-designed along with digital technology. Wi-Fi is available across the campus. Library is open for twelve hours, from 8 am to 8 pm and most of the books are available for research and academics.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Terna Engineering College

likes.text: The top recruiting companies like TCS, INFOSYS, WIPRO, L and T Infotech, Capgemini, Siemens etc, usually came for placement.
The placement department takes a lot of efforts for our new engineers to get them placed in the best companies that come to the college.

Placements.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: The canteen and mess facility is also very good they provide variety of food items in affordable price segment and food delivery is also available.
In our college, all classrooms have air conditioners, free internet for students, and a huge library.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: Faculty here are well qualified and helpful in each session and knowledgeable too, And teaching quality is great and improvement is increasing day by day.
Course curriculum is good as it pushes students to gets hands on to the practicals.

likes.text: I chose this computer engineering because I am very much interested in computer technology, computer science and coding.
The students can enjoy themselves by indulging in various activities like technical and cultural fest, sports, etc.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: IIMT Group of Institutions offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as UG Diploma. Whereas, at PG level, IIMT Group of Institutions offers courses such as MBA/PGDM and Executive MBA/PGDM. IIMT Group of Institutions fee structure for all the courses is around INR 65,500 to 6,50,000.

faqs.answer: A:    IIMT Group of Institutions provides programmes including MBA/PGDM, Executive MBA/PGDM, UG Diploma in streams such as Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in HealthCare & Hospital, Pharma, Operations, Finance, Retail.

review_content.Placements: Placements were good in 2023. Around 60-70% of the students got placed, with roles in teaching and administrative services. The highest package was ?5 LPA, and the average package was ?3 LPA. Internships were also provided in local schools and organizations.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is decent with well-equipped classrooms and a library. However, Wi-Fi facilities need improvement. The hostel is clean, and the food in the mess is satisfactory. Sports facilities like a playground and indoor games are also available.

reviews_list.review_title: Great ethics of faculty, good infrastructure , the facilities were good.

review_content.Placements: The placements sessions were good as various kinds of companies visited in our college and I got placed in 2 of them but I do not join due to some issues. The highest salary package was of 3.6 LPA and the lowest was of 1.8 LPA. The companies visited were Wipro, IBM, British telecom, EQS and many others. Such companies provided customer service, sales, customer dealing, tele calling. The average internship percentage was 74% . The Stipend was provided was 7000-8000 rupees per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities of the college is good. They provide us wi-fi the classroom were well furnished and the library has the rich source of our studies. the medical insurance facility is also provided. the sports meet and cultural activities were held in every cultural festival. The quality of the food is good in the mess and in canteen also. Sometimes we join the mess for lunch. The facilities for the hostellers were quite good. there were basketball court, swimming pool, volleyball court for the hostellers. During my time, some construction was going on and the infrastructure is good.

faqs.answer: Yes, the International School of Management Studies (ISMS) is a good college. It is a private business school located in Pune, India. ISMS is accredited by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA) and the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE).ISMS offers a variety of postgraduate programs in management, including MBA, and PGDM. college_info.intro: Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research provides UG and PG-level programme. The courses provided by the institute include BTech and MTech in AI & Data Science Engineering, Automation & Robotics Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering (IoT- Cyber Security including Block chain), Electronics & Communication Engineering and others. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 45% in Class 12 and secure valid scores in JEE Main. Moreover, for admission to courses such as MTech, candidates must secure valid scores in GATE. The fee structure for the respective courses varies from INR 1.2 Lakh to INR 3.1 Lakh. Considering the ROI, the highest package was recorded as INR 27 LPA and the average package was recorded as INR 5 LPA, respectively. Below are the PIEMR popular programmes:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research provides both undergraduate and postgraduate programmes in various specialisations. PIEMR offers NBA-accredited courses in affiliation with RGPV, Bhopal. The institute offers full-time courses such as BTech, MTech, and MBA. Offering courses based on merit and entrance exam, PIEMR considers eligibility to be 45% in Class 12 along with valid scores in JEE Main for admission to BTech. Whereas, for MTech, candidates must qualify entrance exams such as GATE. Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research offers these courses based on a fee structure including tuition fees ranging from to .

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates can pursue any course at Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research after achieving eligible scores at the accepted entrance exams. The Institute offers BTech based on the minimum aggregate of 45% secured in Class 12 along with Science stream. Furthermore, candidates must secure valid scores in JEE Main and qualify for counselling. The final admission is granted after qualifying all the selection rounds and paying the fees.
faqs.question: Can I join PIEMR after Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research offers courses such as MBA, BTech and M.Tech in full-time mode. The Institute offers these courses on the basis of merit and entrance. Apart from that, the Institute offers these courses based on the most minimal expense possible. PIEMR BTech fee structure includes a tuition fee ranging from INR 2.7 Lakh to INR 3.1 Lakh. Whereas, courses such as MBA has a tuition fee of INR 39 K. M.Tech on the other hand, can be pursued based on the tuition fees ranging from INR 1.2 Lacs to INR 1.25 Lakh. The fee structure also involve several other components apart from the tuition fees. It also varies as per the duration and the level of the course along with the specialisation chose for. Therefore, the Institute offers academia at the most decent cost possible, making it accessible for everyone.
faqs.question: How costly is PIEMR?

faqs.answer: A:    To be eligible for admission to BTech at Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research, candidates are required to pass Class 12 in the Science stream from a recognised board with a minimum of 45% (135 marks) in PCM for General and OBC category candidates,  40% (120 marks) for SC/ST & OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) from a recognised board. Further, candidates must appear for the accepted entrance exam JEE Main, followed by MP counselling round. After fulfillment of the eligibility criteria, candidates are required to visit the official website of the university to apply online.

faqs.answer: PIEMR course admission is conducted by DTE, MP. Eligible candidates need to apply to their desired course online through the official website of the institute. Many good companies visit the college, like TCS, Tata, Birla, Adani Group, Aditya, etc. PIEMR is very nice, and students can enjoy themselves on the campus.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are available in the college. Labs are very nice, and students can enjoy themselves in labs. The lab arrangement is very systematic and their facilities are different from others. New labs are made in PIEMR.
content.Faculty: Faculty members help us and teach very well. Many faculty members are PhD holders. Their knowledge is based on a very systematic approach. Their teaching abilities and quality are very good. Semester exams are conducted on our own campus. They are very nice.

admission_overview.title: PIEMR Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research admission is open. Admission is done through the Directorate of Technical Education (DTE), MP counselling based on the performance of the aspirants in the national-level entrance exam. Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research accepts JEE Mains scores for admission to the BTech course. The institute offers BTech in multiple specialisations, such as AI & Data Science Engineering, Automation & Robotics Engineering, Interested candidates can apply online to their desired courses, after matching the basic eligibility criteria, through the PIEMR official website.

eligibility_selection.title: PIEMR Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research admission is entrance-based. The college offers an online application for all the courses, for admission to BTech candidates need to appear JEE Main exam, followed by MP BE Counselling. Check out Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research course eligibility & selection criteria in the following table:

admission_process.title: PIEMR Admission process 2026

paragraphs: The PIEMR admission process includes several steps beginning with the release of the PIEMR application form followed by appearing for the selection rounds, and then receiving the final admission offer. The detailed PIEMR admission process is given below:
PIEMR Application Process 2026
Applications can be filled in online and offline modes. Students should check the eligibility before applying.
PIEMR Selection Process

According to the selection criteria, the candidates are required to apply for the JEE Mains entrance exam accepted by the college for admission to BTech. After clearing the entrance exam, candidates are required to appear for MP BE Counselling for admission to the BTech programme.
PIEMR Final Admission Offer
Selected candidates need to pay thePrestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research feeand visit the college campus for the document verification process.

placement_data.title: PIEMR Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: According to PIEMR placements 2023, the highest package provided was INR 19.80 LPA, and the average package offered was INR 5 LPA. Over 120 companies took part in the placement drive. Companies such as Mahindra, Eicher, Force Motors, UltraTech , etc., came to the campus.

tables.context: How good is PIEMR College of Indore for placements

faqs.question: How good is PIEMR College of Indore for placements?
faqs.answer: Over 120 companies visited the PIEMR campus to hire the 2023 passing out batch. In addition, the highest and average packages offered were INR 19.80 LPA and INR 5 LPA, respectively. Check the complete insights of PIEMR Indore placements 2023 from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Highest package INR 19.80 LPA Average package INR 5 LPA Companies visited 120+

faqs.question: How to prepare for PIEMR placements?
faqs.answer: Most of the companies start the placement process with a pre-placement talk that describes the job profile, the company's vision and the services provided by them. Students are advised to attend the PPT for the desired company as it is the base step of preparation for that particular company. Thereafter, prepare a decent resume highlighting your skills, academic background, and extra-curricular details. The most important step of the placement interview is the test conducted by the interviewer. Students should well prepare the Logical Reasoning, Verbal Ability, and Quantitative Awareness topics. Alongside this, prepare the basics of the core subject, depending upon the branch they are studying in. To excel in the GD round, try to initiate first and listen carefully to the point put forward by the other members.

faqs.question: How costly is PIEMR?
faqs.answer: Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research offers courses such as MBA, BTech and M.Tech in full-time mode. The Institute offers these courses on the basis of merit and entrance. Apart from that, the Institute offers these courses based on the most minimal expense possible. PIEMR BTech fee structure includes a tuition fee ranging from INR 2.7 Lakh to INR 3.1 Lakh . Whereas, courses such as MBA has a tuition fee of INR 39 K. M.Tech on the other hand, can be pursued based on the tuition fees ranging from INR 1.2 Lacs to INR 1.25 Lakh. The fee structure also involve several other components apart from the tuition fees. It also varies as per the duration and the level of the course along with the specialisation chose for. Therefore, the Institute offers academia at the most decent cost possible, making it accessible for everyone.

cut_off.college_name: PIEMR Cutoff 2025: Check JEE Main Round Wise Ranks

description: What's new at Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research cutoff 2023? JEE Main 2024 registration is ongoing for the academic year 2024-25. Candidates seeking admission to Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research must register online. JEE Main exam 2024 is scheduled to be held on Jan 24, 2023 to Feb 01, 2023. Following the previous year's schedule, Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research JEE Main cutoff 2024 will start releasing the round-wise cutoff lists tentatively in the month of Jan.

Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 531406 and 1471250 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 531406, B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 531406.

For the OBC category students, the JEE Main last round closing rank was 1176144 for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. Of all the BTech specialisations, the most competitive was B.E. / B.Tech. For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.

Considering the Prestige Institute of Engineering Management and Research B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General HS category students were B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with last-round closing ranks of 531406, 837039, and 1023823, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: Perfect study for serious student and great teachers .
reviews.review_text: You will be impressed with this college and teaching and teachers quality is world level I passed out in 2022 with higher grade before admission please visit this college bring your parents and take a tour of college, festival celebration and sports organisation good opportunity you will get.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is overall good, but it is still developing and under construction. Soon, it will be completed, and all classes will be air-conditioned. Wi-Fi facilities are also good. All labs have Wi-Fi, and all classes have smart screens. The canteen is also under construction, so it will be completed soon.

reviews.review_heading: Overall good for studies, placement and enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: In prestige institute all the provides a good and strong material to study and hostel have separate Wi-Fi. Separate beds and specially food and water are not that bad as water is mineraled here. The infrastructure of college get renewed every 3 months so well so good .

reviews.review_heading: The college has industry-relevant curriculum with helpful teachers.
reviews.review_text: PIEMR provides modern infrastructure and facilities to support both academic excellence and overall student development. The institute has well-organized classrooms with smartboards and AC. The library and resource center house thousands of books, journals, newspapers, and e-resources.

reviews.review_heading: It's very pleasant to come to the PIEMR campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are available in the college. Labs are very nice, and students can enjoy themselves in labs. The lab arrangement is very systematic and their facilities are different from others. New labs are made in PIEMR.

reviews.review_heading: College is good and valuable to choose.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are provided by our college. Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and proper labs are available. We do not have a college hostel as such mandatory but we are living near by it, and it is very friendly and helpful for students.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good and would be a better option to choose.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are provided by our college, that is, Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and proper labs related to my course. We do not have a college hostel as such, but we are living near it. It is very friendly and helpful for students.

reviews.review_heading: All the faculty are very good, and infrastructure is also amazing.
reviews.review_text: Although the infrastructure of our college is good, it is excellent for the events that are held in our college. Our main event is where we do lots and lots of activities, just like sports, singing, and dancing etc. Whole community participates in that, and a good interaction between teacher and student.

reviews.review_heading: College with supportive faculty members and good placements but lacks hostel and major events.
reviews.review_text: ollege has decent infrastructure with well-equipped labs and a good library for students. Still, there is no hostel facility on campus. Overall, the available facilities are sufficient for academic growth. College is good in terms of fee and infrastructure. Although the campus is small, it is well managed and focused on quality education. College is good.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money, no flashy life but an elegant college for engineering and learning.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good for equipment and classes but not a very big campus to roam around. They have assured us that all the labs and equipment are good. There is no garden. We have a small and boring canteen. All classrooms have good quality furniture with coolers. There are ACs in most of the classrooms. Smart boards are also there in all the classes.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest every student take admission in this college. It helpful for your future.
reviews.review_text: My college offers libraries with all kinds of books, including comics, history, course-related books, and more. Every type of book is available here. Also, the college has smart classrooms that enhance the student better experience. Computer labs and civil labs are also available and are very good.

reviews.review_heading: The journey to be a Prestigian.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are available for your course/department (e.g. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library). College provides various facilities like proper computer labs with well-established internet connection. Library contains a vast library of books, magazines, and books. Classroom has smartboards and proper sitting arrangements for students. The quality of food in the canteen is good in taste. Proper hygiene is maintained in canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Good for the students specially for CSE branch.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is basically good but not up to the mark, computer labs are a little good, there is full facilities for the Wi-Fi, there is no specific hostel for the engineering students for our college, but the sports facilities are good, many of my friends are playing national from college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall PIEMR is good for pursuing engineering in Indore.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in the lab only. Laboratories are well-equipped but some systems are not working well. The library is small but sufficient because the campus has less crowd. Classrooms have facilities like projectors smart boards, and air conditioners. There is no hostel facility available. There is no ground for sports but they provide it in different places near campus. The food quality of the canteen is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Everything of the college is good enough and can be considered good for taking admission
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good and enough for the students. A large number of machinery and computers for the students in various labs. The classes are also good enough. The food in the canteen can be considered average. All the facilities are available on the campus itself.

reviews_list.review_title: I recommend CERT for a better future.

review_content.Placements: 60-70% of students got placed this year. The maximum package offered is about 10 LPA, which is good. The minimum package is 4-5 LPA. HCL, Capgemini and many more companies came to our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good quality computer labs and a well-settled library are available with good space, and most of the books are available. The campus is neat and clean. Good Wi-Fi is available on campus. The hostel and canteen and other facilities are good.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are very helpful, qualified and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is very good. The course curriculum is relevant and makes the students industry-ready. Semester exams are not so hard, and the pass percentage is about 100%.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good in all the departments, and I am satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: About 150 students get passed from our batch. The highest salary offered was Rs. 35,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month. About 70% of the students got placed in our college. About 70% of the students from our course got an internship. All the students got placed in reputed companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all the necessary facilities for students. The college offers a good atmosphere. The college provides hostel facility for both boys and girls separately. Quality of food served in our college mess is very good.

overview_faqs.question: Why is College of Engineering and Rural Technology so famous?
overview_faqs.answer: The College of Engineering and Rural Technology (CERT) has earned an excellent reputation for quality technical education, particularly in the rural belts. It is famous for offering a range of undergraduate and postgraduate engineering programmes with a thrust on practical, industry-oriented skill learning. All this is tied together by the strength of the faculty, modern infrastructure, and research and innovation. In addition to this, the placement cell is very active for the students in CERT, and the institution collaborates with different industries. It provides excellent employment opportunities for its students. Moreover, since it delivers affordable education, its mission to uplift rural students further adds up to its prominence.

review_summary.college_name: College of Engineering and Rural Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Value for Money and placement.

content.Placements: About 70% students got placed. The lowest is for 3LPA and the highest is for 12LPA. Average package is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Amazon, Flipkart and Teach Mahendra. About 70 percent students got internship from campus in Tech Mahendra, Zintech pvt, Cisco, Tata, Amazon and Flipkart. Top roles offered are Software engineer, Data scientist, Data analyst, Full Sack Developer, Front end developer, Web Developer and Machine engineer.
content.Infrastructure: All the basic facilities are provided such as Lab, Wi-Fi, Library, etc. Some facilities such as Online classes, Helpdesk through WhatsApp, Central library and Separate Labs for CSE students also provided. All facilities are provided for Hostelers such as mess, medical and Library and food quality is also excellent or value for money. Also helpline for Hostelers is provided.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of College of Engineering and Rural Technology.

content.Placements: Our college provided good placements. The placement cell was good. About 60-80% of students got placed. Top recruiting companies like HCL, Tata, Infosys, etc., visited our campus.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel provided good facilities. Rooms were cleaned well. The food quality in the mess was good. Air-conditioners were available in classrooms. A library was available.
content.Faculty: Our teachers were helpful and well-trained. Our teachers cleared our doubts. Exams were conducted semester-wise. Semester exams were easy.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I recommend CERT for a better future.

content.Placements: 60-70% of students got placed this year. The maximum package offered is about 10 LPA, which is good. The minimum package is 4-5 LPA. HCL, Capgemini and many more companies came to our college.
content.Infrastructure: Good quality computer labs and a well-settled library are available with good space, and most of the books are available. The campus is neat and clean. Good Wi-Fi is available on campus. The hostel and canteen and other facilities are good.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are very helpful, qualified and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is very good. The course curriculum is relevant and makes the students industry-ready. Semester exams are not so hard, and the pass percentage is about 100%.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good in all the departments, and I am satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: About 150 students get passed from our batch. The highest salary offered was Rs. 35,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month. About 70% of the students got placed in our college. About 70% of the students from our course got an internship. All the students got placed in reputed companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all the necessary facilities for students. The college offers a good atmosphere. The college provides hostel facility for both boys and girls separately. Quality of food served in our college mess is very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure of our college is good, but the placement opportunities are very less.

content.Placements: Placements for the civil engineering department are very poor. I don't know about other departments, but only one company has visited the campus to hire civil engineering students. The name of the company that visited the campus to hire civil students was Lintech, and it has offered a salary of Rs. 20,000-25,000 per month. Around 12-13 students got placed in the company after the written test and interview. The companies asked everyone to pay Rs. 1,000-1,500 as the registration fee and gave the students a letter. But on the day of joining, they asked for more money, and this is how everyone was fooled. Students refused to join that company and asked the college for the refund.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bansal Institute of Engineering and Technology (BIET,Lucknow) offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Bansal Institute of Engineering and Technology (BIET,Lucknow) courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Bansal Institute of Engineering and Technology (BIET,Lucknow) courses stands around INR 1,28,000 to 2,84,712.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Bansal Institute of Engineering and Technology (BIET, Lucknow) is approximately INR 128000 - INR 284712.

faqs.answer: A:    Bansal Institute of Engineering and Technology (BIET, Lucknow) is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Bansal Institute of Engineering and Technology (BIET, Lucknow) are Agriculture & Farm Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Biotechnology Engineering.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Bansal Institute of Engineering and Technology (BIET, Lucknow)?

faqs.answer: A:    Bansal Institute of Engineering and Technology (BIET, Lucknow) provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Agriculture & Farm Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Biotechnology Engineering.

reviews_list.review_title: Comprehensive campus and course experience review.

review_content.Placements: In our branch 20 percent of students are placed. The highest package is 3LPA, the lowest package is 1.2LPA. Most students are not placed because the placement cell does not provide a tech company. Many students are facing a problem during placement in college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our course has modern infrastructure including well equipped classrooms smart boards computer labs with high speed internet 20 Mbps a library with digital and physical resources and a cafeteria. Hostels and spacious secure with Wi-Fi common area mess facilities and 24/7 security ensuring a comfortable student life.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information and Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Decent faculty and infrastructure, but it needs better industry exposure and placement assistance.

review_content.Placements: Placements are really horrible. You don't get any placement via the college, and even if you do, the package is really horrible. Many students can't even get a salary of Rs. 10,000 per month. Very few to no companies come to college for placement. This is the only direct review specifically for the IT branch. Only about 20% of students are placed. The highest package offered is 7 LPA, the lowest is 1.5 LPA, and the average is 3 LPA. The top recruiters are Wipro, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, HCL, and Chetu. Internship opportunities are none via college, students need to apply independently.

review_summary.college_name: Bansal Institute of Engineering and Technology (BIET,Lucknow) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is also the best college for lighting our future in engineering.

content.Placements: In the Bansal Institute of Engineering and Technology, combining all branches, we can say approximately 50-60 percent of placements are provided, more like in IT and CS courses. The package offered ranges from 1-7 to 10 LPA. Companies like Infosys, Instagram, and some middle-level companies recruit students. In my course, 50 -60 percent of students get internships in many companies. Many roles are offered, like quality, design, and maintenance engineers.
content.Infrastructure: The Bansal Institute of Engineering and Technology hostels are very well maintained and governed by our college. I did not stay in a hostel, so I don't know very well about it, but my friends told me that there is no Wi-Fi. There is a good environment in the library, labs, and classrooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The best college for students.

content.Placements: It provides an average level of placement of about 4-5 LPA to good and quality students who work on themselves during their programme of study, gain knowledge, as well as skills. This is one of the best colleges in Lucknow.
content.Infrastructure: There is a good environment in the hostel as well as in the course.
content.Faculty: There is a lot of curriculum in this college other than studies. There is no toughness in exams, they made you familiar with the paper pattern well enough, so when you sit in the exam, you will not get nervous or anything else during the paper and in the examination centre. You will be treated very well by your faculty teacher. This college will provide you with lots of other skills, gain opportunities, including your curriculum of studies and other materials.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information and Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Comprehensive campus and course experience review.

content.Placements: In our branch 20 percent of students are placed. The highest package is 3LPA, the lowest package is 1.2LPA. Most students are not placed because the placement cell does not provide a tech company. Many students are facing a problem during placement in college.
content.Infrastructure: Our course has modern infrastructure including well equipped classrooms smart boards computer labs with high speed internet 20 Mbps a library with digital and physical resources and a cafeteria. Hostels and spacious secure with Wi-Fi common area mess facilities and 24/7 security ensuring a comfortable student life.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information and Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Decent faculty and infrastructure, but it needs better industry exposure and placement assistance.

content.Placements: Placements are really horrible. You don't get any placement via the college, and even if you do, the package is really horrible. Many students can't even get a salary of Rs. 10,000 per month. Very few to no companies come to college for placement. This is the only direct review specifically for the IT branch. Only about 20% of students are placed. The highest package offered is 7 LPA, the lowest is 1.5 LPA, and the average is 3 LPA. The top recruiters are Wipro, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, HCL, and Chetu. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, college and the environment of college are excellent for engineering.

content.Placements: Placement is quite good, and every year the company visits and offers placement to students. Placement is excellent and good. Very popular companies have been visiting every year. So, overall, the placement is good and valuable for students.
content.Infrastructure: Course of biotech in Bansal Institute is well. Lab in the department of biotech are well maintained, and the labs are excellent. About the hostel, it is good and environment of hostel is quiet. Also mess service is available in hostel. Hostel is good for both studying and living.

reviews.review_heading: It is also the best college for lighting our future in engineering.
reviews.review_text: The Bansal Institute of Engineering and Technology hostels are very well maintained and governed by our college. I did not stay in a hostel, so I don't know very well about it, but my friends told me that there is no Wi-Fi. There is a good environment in the library, labs, and classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for students.
reviews.review_text: There is a good environment in the hostel as well as in the course.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive campus and course experience review.
reviews.review_text: Our course has modern infrastructure including well equipped classrooms smart boards computer labs with high speed internet 20 Mbps a library with digital and physical resources and a cafeteria. Hostels and spacious secure with Wi-Fi common area mess facilities and 24/7 security ensuring a comfortable student life.

reviews.review_heading: Decent faculty and infrastructure, but it needs better industry exposure and placement assistance.
reviews.review_text: The college has modern classrooms, smart boards, a well-equipped lab for IT, CSE, Electronics, and mechanical, and a large library with 40,000+ books and e-resources. Campus Wi-Fi is available. Hostels are separate for boys and girls, with AC/non-AC rooms and basic furniture. Wi-Fi in the hostels is consistent. The mess and canteen are available. The food hygiene and taste are mixed. Some complaints and protests over quality. On-campus first-aid is provided, with tie-ups with the nearby hospital...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college and the environment of college are excellent for engineering.
reviews.review_text: Course of biotech in Bansal Institute is well. Lab in the department of biotech are well maintained, and the labs are excellent. About the hostel, it is good and environment of hostel is quiet. Also mess service is available in hostel. Hostel is good for both studying and living.

reviews.review_heading: Helpful faculty members, good labs, decent placements, and a campus that supports growth.
reviews.review_text: College offers well-maintained classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, and fully equipped labs for practical learning. Library has a good collection of books and digital resources. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms,  24/7 water, and electricity. Mess provides average food with a hygienic kitchen, and the canteen offers a variety of snacks at reasonable prices. Medical facilities are available with a visiting doctor and basic first aid. There are sports grounds for cricket, football, and volley...

reviews.review_heading: The college offers good infrastructure with Wi-Fi, labs, and smart classrooms.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is satisfactory, with access to Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and a decent library with relevant books and resources. Hostel facilities are average, with basic amenities like clean rooms and 24x7 water. Mess food is manageable but repetitive. Medical aid is available. Sports facilities like volleyball, badminton, and a small gym are provided.

reviews.review_heading: Balanced campus life with supportive faculty, and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Bansal Institute of Engineering and Technology in Lucknow offers decent infrastructure for engineering students. Classrooms are well-lit and equipped with projectors, and labs are functional with the required tools for CSE and other branches. The campus has Wi-Fi, a library, and a canteen. Hostels are average. Rooms are shared, with basic furniture, water coolers, and laundry facilities. The food is okay, but not exceptional. Security is decent, and wardens are responsive. It is not a luxury, bu...

reviews.review_heading: Good to take admission here.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, and the college also provides i3-i5 labs, which shows upgradation. In the hostel, it provides both AC and non-AC rooms, and the food quality is average. The canteen facility is also good, as it provides a menu according to the time. The college sports facilities are also available, and the college organizes a fest that contains sports competitions.

reviews.review_heading: It is better to take admission here but at our own risk.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in our college. Classrooms are well-maintained. The library has a large collection of books. The hostel mess facility is a little bit worse. The hygiene is not maintained and students get ill. But the watercooler facility is given in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good if we only want to study. It provided good placements for two students in 2021.
reviews.review_text: At Bansal Institute of Engineering and Technology, the hostel facilities are above average but rules are hard for students. Wi-Fi facilities are not provided in the hostel, and if we need then we can get fitted on our own. Labs, classrooms, library, etc., are average. In the library, we cannot use our phones. The quality of facilities in the hostel is good. Food available in the mess is something good and the canteen facility has certain timing. There are both AC and non-AC rooms.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to do something in your future then take admission to my college.
reviews.review_text: College has huge classes and seminar halls for programs/events. College has a high-speed Wi-Fi service. College hostel rooms are AC and non-AC. Mess food is decent but you enjoy hostel life. College canteen's sitting capacity is around 50 to 60 students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied just because of the support we got from our college.
reviews.review_text: There are well-maintained labs with proper Wi-Fi facilities. Our hostel has 2 messes, one for boys and one for girls, and the food quality is the best too. Every month, the menu of mess food is changed as per students' wishes. Proper hygienic food is available for us.

reviews.review_heading: My college faculty is very well-educated, and the infrastructure of my college is very good.
reviews.review_text: My department lab and Wi Fi facility are very good and the classrooms are clean and clear. Library facilities are very good and available. The hostel food is satisfactory but the campus is very good and provides sports facilities and medical facilities. The hostel rooms are cleaned.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very bad. The faculty is nice, but the management is not.
reviews.review_text: Faculty is good. Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms are okay, and the library is okay. The hostel is very bad and is like a jail. Teachers are very helpful and knowledgeable. No extracurricular activities are performed, and semester exams are difficult.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Bansal Institute of Engineering and Technology (BIET,Lucknow)

likes.text: All the students have been placed in good companies like HCL, WIPRO, INFOSYS, MAERSK, AIRTEL, TCS and many more.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a very strict college.

review_content.Placements: Only 40% of students who placed in our course are very talented. The highest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month, the lowest is Rs. 10,000 per month, and the average is Rs. 18,000 per month. There are no top recruiting companies. About 25% of students got internships from our course at average companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Computers in our labs have only 2 GB RAM. Wi-Fi is only available to faculty. Classrooms are fine but do not have whiteboards. Hostel rooms, mess, and canteen are good. For medical facilities, we have P. S. V. Multispeciality Hospital near the college. Sports and games are also average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students did not get placements. They conduct campus interviews for the name.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything was available in this college. The laboratory mark was based on internal and academic marks for each person. There were morning and evening tests. It was like school. I would not recommend students to join this college.
review_content.Other: I opted for this course, because my sister recommend me this course. Our college life was not good, because it conducts morning and evening tests and re-tests as well. In this college, sports were not available. The cultural events, annual day, and college tours were not conducted. Students cannot even celebrate their birthday with friends inside this college. Students should not interact with other girls on campus. I would recommend students to take admission to other colleges. It was a pure school kind of environment.

individual_reviews.title: Good for studies with average fees and a good environment.

content.Placements: 40 per cent of students are getting placed. 2 LPA to 8 LPA packages are what students got. Startups and good companies are coming for the placement drive. Good at placement training. They provide good placement training for students from their second year for placement.
content.Infrastructure: Good college infrastructure, classroom and labs with available Wi-Fi and a library with a student login with a beneficial website. The hostel is average, and the food is good for the cost. I like the college infrastructure, it's cool inside even in the summer times.

individual_reviews.title: P.S.V College of Engineering.

content.Placements: I am currently pursuing a B.Tech in information technology at P.S.V College of Engineering and Technology. It is affiliated with Anna University, as part of the 2021-2025 batch. The placement statistics for our course highlight that around 75% of students got placed successfully. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. The average salary package offered is approximately 4.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The information technology department at P.S.V College of Engineering and Technology is well-equipped with Wi-Fi-enabled smart classrooms, modern computer labs featuring updated hardware and software, and a department library with a wide range of technical books and journals. The central library offers E-books, journals, and a serene study space.

reviews.review_heading: The review of P.S.V. College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not that bad. The college gives much importance to the education. We have high-tech lab facilities, but the Wi-Fi facility is not available here. Classrooms are excellent, and the classroom atmosphere is good. The college also has a library, and the canteen is good here. Hostel rooms are good here. Students are restricted to use mobile phones on the campus. However, the medical facilities provided here are good.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and staff are excellent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good. Labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library are good. The hostel is average, and the mess food is of good quality. The canteen, sports, and games are also nice. Medical facilities are excellent and supportive of students’ health.

reviews.review_heading: Jy college has good infrastructure and talented faculties
reviews.review_text:
My college has good infrastructure and talented staffs.... it was a good place for education and discipline...every department has separate laboratory with wifi facilities and libraries 
All type of facilities are available in my college 
24hrs medical facilities and food was really good like home foods...canteen was also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a neat and decent college. There is nothing special, but it's okay.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best. The hostel is not in good condition, but it's okay. The food is the worst, and they give us some free food. There is no coaching for hostel students. There is no Wi-Fi. It has the best classrooms and a good library. The canteen is okay. Medical facilities are the best. Sports are developing. There are no games.

placements.overview: Established in 2004, Department of Commerce and Management - MBA Unit, Shivaji University is a public institute in Kolhapur, Maharashtra. The institute is approved by the AICTE. At the PG levels, the institute offers 1 course across 1 specialisation in Full Time mode. The popular Department of Commerce and Management - MBA Unit, Shivaji University program include MBA/PGDM. Department of Commerce and Management - MBA Unit, Shivaji University course is provided in stream including Business & Management Studies. The institute has a total seat intake of 60 students. The fees at Department of Commerce and Management - MBA Unit, Shivaji University is INR 1,26,000 for the different courses. Department of Commerce and Management - MBA Unit, Shivaji University placements are vibrant, with the average median salary standing at around INR 1,40,000. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.
