reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good Infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not for average students. The highest salary package offered in our college is 7 LPA. Top companies are offered to us students and internship must be for 50 days and also we need to do projects. Teachers give good guidance to projects and are supportive to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are good, and we have the best library in our city. A free Wi-Fi facility is available and we have free labs, good classrooms, and a library. Hostel of boys and girls are in separate buildings, and we have also a canteen and sports facilities. Students get medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The college has a very good environment, and it is a good college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60 students got placed in a batch. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA. Companies like Amul and Justdial are the top recruiting companies for this course. All students got an internship from the batch.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi for university is free in the departments and hostel. There are e-classrooms, and the library is also awesome in which any kind of book is available. In the hostel, there are excellent facilities for girls as well as boys, and safety of girls is the first priority which is taken by wardens. Food facilities in the hostel are also good, and the room allocated for students is also good. The class is full of infrastructure, and all facilities are provided to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placement in 2022, really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The quality of placements is the best. Companies visit the college with high hopes, offering salary packages of 6-9 LPA, while the highest package reaches up to 18 LPA. The placement teams always lend support during the process. The placement rate exceeds 90%, with an average package of 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college's infrastructure is incredibly aesthetic. The buildings were constructed with a modern theme. Basic facilities like the gym, sports center, and auditorium are well-maintained. All classrooms are equipped with smart projectors, providing Wi-Fi access to everyone.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I would recommend students to join this college.

review_content.Placements: Around 88% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies visited our college for recruitment. The top role was not offered in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities were very good. Laboratory was better. Canteen was very good. Mess was available. The food served in the canteen was average. Sports were conducted in this college.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were helpful. They always clarify our doubts. The course curriculum was relevant. Semester exams were conducted after every six months. The passing percentage was 95%.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: The college life here is satisfying.

review_content.Placements: I have no clear idea about how well the placements are in the college, but previous records have shown a great response in placements. Not every student gets placed, and the competition is tough. I have no idea about the average and the highest packages offered in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has all the fundamental infrastructure and equipment, and everything is well-maintained for use. We have a good and free gymnasium, and the playgrounds are also well maintained. Hostel facilities are provided, but the hostels are not up to the mark.

review_summary.college_name: Vogue Institute of Art and Design Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Graduate Diploma in Fashion Designing and Management (GDFDM) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty modern infrastructure and good campus life.

content.Placements: I am extremely satisfied with the placement support at Vogue Institute of Art and Design, Bangalore. The college provides excellent industry exposure through internships, live projects. The students are placed in many reputable companies in the design field, such as those in fashion design and interior design.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Vogue Institute of Art and Design is impressive and well-equipped to support all creative courses. The classrooms are modern. The labs and studios have all the latest tools and technologies for fashion designing, and hostel facilities are also good.

individual_reviews.course: Graduate Diploma in Fashion Designing and Management (GDFDM) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My experience at Vogue Institute of Art & Design.

content.Placements: I completed my fashion design course in 2023, and it was a highly enriching experience that helped me shape both my creative and professional skills. Around 98% of the students from my batch got placed in top companies like ZARA and Tommy Hilfiger.
content.Infrastructure: The fashion design department was well-equipped with CAD labs, sewing machines and the library had lots of journals and books for the subject. Hostels were clean with good food and security. A basic medical facility is provided on campus. The college also focuses on sports and other games.

individual_reviews.course: Graduate Diploma in Fashion Designing and Management (GDFDM) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My fashion design experience.

content.Placements: I graduated from the batch of 2023, fashion designing. Nearly 97% of my classmates got placed with packages ranging from 4 LPA to 6 LPA. Top recruiter companies were from Zara, H&M, and Raymond. 100% of students got paid internships in top companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our fashion design department was equipped with labs, design studios, sewing, and CAD labs with Wi-Fi and spacious classrooms. Library had great fashion resources like magazines and journals. Canteen had variety of food, and the canteen area was so big and mesmerising.

individual_reviews.course: Graduate Diploma in Fashion Designing and Management (GDFDM) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Industry ready fashion design education with skilled faculty members.

content.Placements: I graduated from the fashion design batch of 2022. About 95% were placed with packages of 6-8 LPA. Top recruiters were H&M, ZARA, and Raymond. 100% of the students got paid internships at top brands as a fashion designer, stylist, or merchandiser.
content.Infrastructure: The institute had well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi enabled classrooms and a resourceful library. The hostels were clean with decent rooms and offered good quality food. There were many indoor games and activities. The classrooms had inspirational design to motivate students.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Graphic and Web Designing - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and facilities.

content.Placements: I am from 2024 batch of the graphic design diploma course. Around 92-95% of students got placed. The average package is around 5 LPA. Most students got internships in branding, motion graphic, and graphic designer roles. Top recruiters included Amazon and Adobe.
content.Infrastructure: The graphic design department is well-equipped with computer labs, adobe software, and reliable systems. The classrooms are modern and well lit designed for collaborative learning. The environment is tech-forward, inspiring, and ideal for developing professional-level design skills.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BSc at Vogue Institute of Art and Design?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for B.Sc at Vogue Institute of Art and Design is that the student must have passed their 10+2 exam or equivalent exam with an aggregate of 50%. The institute offers B.Sc in Fashion & Apparel Design, Interior Design & Decoration, and Jewellery Designing & Management. The duration of the course is 3 years.the admission to these courses is based on the merit received by the students in their 10+2 program. The institution has signed MOUs with a number of notable organizations, providing training programs and placement opportunities to the students. VIAD offers 100% placement assistance to students.

Hostels were clean with good food and security. A basic medical facility is provided on campus. The college also focuses on sports and other games.

reviews.review_heading: My fashion design experience.
reviews.review_text: Our fashion design department was equipped with labs, design studios, sewing, and CAD labs with Wi-Fi and spacious classrooms. Library had great fashion resources like magazines and journals. Canteen had variety of food, and the canteen area was so big and mesmerising.

reviews.review_heading: Industry ready fashion design education with skilled faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The institute had well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi enabled classrooms and a resourceful library. The hostels were clean with decent rooms and offered good quality food. There were many indoor games and activities. The classrooms had inspirational design to motivate students.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The graphic design department is well-equipped with computer labs, adobe software, and reliable systems. The classrooms are modern and well lit designed for collaborative learning. The environment is tech-forward, inspiring, and ideal for developing professional-level design skills.

reviews.review_heading: Your gateway to success in design: Vogue Institute of Art and Design.
reviews.review_text: Vogue Institute of Art and Design stands out not just for its exceptional courses but also for its world-class infrastructure. The campus is designed to inspire creativity, with state-of-the-art classrooms, modern studios, and well-equipped labs tailored for art and design enthusiasts. The hostel facilities are equally commendable, providing a safe comfortable, and conducive environment for learning and personal growth. Spacious rooms, nutritious meals, and excellent amenities in the hostel make...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory placements and faculty are available at this college.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure for the interior design course. Library, canteen, Wi-Fi, sports etc. facilities are available for the students. College management was supportive to the students. The quality of facilities available in the hostel is also good. Food in the mess was good.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and helping faculty available at this college.
reviews.review_text: Vogue Institute of Arts and Design is having a good infrastructure for the interior design course. Management of the college is offering all the facilities to its students to upscale their knowledge. Facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, sports and many more are available in the college campus for the students.

reviews.review_heading: The best interior designing institute in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The greatest facilities are found at the Vogue Interior Design Institute. The hostel offers students a modern and welcoming environment, and the state-of-the-art facilities satisfy all the requirements of our course with just the right amount of creativity and realism, it improves our educational process.

reviews.review_heading: Animation is my passion.
reviews.review_text: Our Vogue campus is equipped with high-tech classrooms, a canteen, toilet rooms, a playground, bus facilities, a library, an auditorium, and a park. Students can make use of them and get the most out of them. And good classrooms with Wi-Fi and greenery surrounded by fashion and apparel parks.

reviews.review_heading: Overall excellence at Vogue Institute.
reviews.review_text: The campus is well-maintained, and the labs are constructed in a way to accommodate large student groups. The labs are cleaned after every period and have full-fledged equipment required to help us with our learning experience. The food in the canteen is healthy and affordable for students. They even have an amazing bus facility for students to travel hassle-free to the college. Students are even taken on adventure trips to have a nice bonding experience with their classmates and faculty members...

reviews.review_heading: Best experience at Vogue Institute.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members at Vogue Institute are not just qualified experts but also compassionate role models, as well as the infrastructure, is up to the mark for each department available at the campus. There's availability of the required equipment along with frequent service. The classrooms are spacious enough for students.

reviews.review_heading: To all the people who want to empower themselves in Fashion.
reviews.review_text: Vogue Institute is the best. World class infrastructure that supports all the students to have hands on experiments and learn things more efficiently which does go from digital labs to fabrication workshop that help students to bring all their ideas to life.

reviews.review_heading: Wonderful place to study. Excellent teachers from NIFT. Great placements.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are excellent. A lot of colors and the atmosphere is vibrant. Vogue is tied up with PGs in central Bangalore. The main campus is in the apparel park. We do go there to visit the campus for all the main events. The classrooms are clean. The environment is wonderful to study. Our HOD is excellent. The library is well-equipped with various design books from all over the world.

reviews.review_heading: Okay college, teachers are good, infrastructure is also good.
reviews.review_text: I don't have anything to say. The infrastructure is good, the teachers are good, but Wi-Fi is not proper. We don't have a hostel; everyone stays in PG or flats, which cost extra money. The labs are good, the classrooms are good, and the library is good. Personally, this college is so boring.

overview_faqs.answer: Sri Vasavi Engineering College is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, UG Diploma, After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Sri Vasavi Engineering College has a rating of 4.07 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.1 on Campus Life, 3.68 on Placements, 4.1 on Faculty and 4.33 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Vasavi Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: In this college, faculty is very helpful to students, and the infrastructure is also good.

content.Placements: In my college, 50 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 20 LPA, the lowest package is 3.5 LPA, and the average package is 6 LPA. The top recruiting companies in my course are Tata, Infosys, and TCS. Around 10% of students get internships at TCS.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a separate block for the library. It is well-maintained and has many books useful for both studies and preparation for competitive exams like GATE. Each block has a separate Wi-Fi, which is very fast. Classrooms and labs provide a good learning environment. Though I am not a hosteller, the food quality is best. The college supports various sports such as cricket and basketball, and conducts cricket tournaments every year. Medical facilities and a gym are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is good and improves the programs.

content.Placements: I chose CSE as my course, almost 80 percent of students are placed in different companies but companies are only service based. If you want product based company, you should go through the online mode. In our college, the highest package in my course is 44 LPA by Amazon, which is product based. The average package offered is 13 LPA and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies in my course are Amazon and Accenture. Roles offered in my course are Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Cyber Security.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available in our college. The infrastructure is too good. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. The food available in the mess and the canteen also having the good taste. We also have medical facilities, yoga, and a open gym.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, faculty is very helpful to students, and the infrastructure is also good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a separate block for the library. It is well-maintained and has many books useful for both studies and preparation for competitive exams like GATE. Each block has a separate Wi-Fi, which is very fast. Classrooms and labs provide a good learning environment. Though I am not a hosteller, the food quality is best. The college supports various sports such as cricket and basketball, and conducts cricket tournaments every year. Medical facilities and a gym are also available.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good and improves the programs.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available in our college. The infrastructure is too good. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. The food available in the mess and the canteen also having the good taste. We also have medical facilities, yoga, and a open gym.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good, and faculty are available at any time of the college.
reviews.review_text: It has good infrastructure and classrooms with projectors. We have a big auditorium. Our department has well-maintained labs. The central library is spacious and has a good collection of books. Hostel facilities are average according to my friends, and they used to say the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good. Faculty members are very helpful.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and labs are good, particularly the computer labs, which have been recently reconstructed. The mess and canteen are also good. Prices in the canteen are reasonable. Next to sports, there is a ground, but we are not allowed to go to the ground during class time. Yet, there is a sports period to play during lunch break if we want. The food served is nice. I am not sure about the medical facilities, but I think some medical facilities are available. There is a library, so we coul...

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good. Faculty members are available during college hours.
reviews.review_text: The library is very good with a large collection of books. The infrastructure is also good in classrooms and laboratories. We have a good indoor stadium and gym. We have a large cricket ground and a volleyball court. For girls, we have an open gym. The infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: Nice faculty, and there are highly qualified professionals.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are okay and not bad. The infrastructure available for our course and department includes Wi-Fi only for faculty and not for students. The library is excellent, with different kinds of books that are useful for students. Classrooms and labs are good. Hostel facilities are okay, and the quality of food in the mess is also okay. Medical facilities are available, but sports and games facilities are very limited.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good, faculty are available at any time of day.
reviews.review_text: In the facilities, well-trained and well-educated staff. The library is very good, the classrooms and labs are excellent, and the infrastructure is excellent. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is very strict, and our wardens are very helpful to us. If there is any issue, they can respond immediately. The mess, canteen, and medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good. Faculty members are available at any time.
reviews.review_text: SVEC College provides good facilities and infrastructure. It supports both academic and personal development. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with projectors. Wi-Fi is available across the campus to help students access study material easily. Computer labs and department-specific labs are well-maintained. It is upgraded with the latest software and systems. It ensures students gain practical knowledge along with theory. Library is another strong point, with a wide collection of academic boo...

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good. Facilities are available during college hours.
reviews.review_text: The library is very good. Classrooms and labs are excellent. The infrastructure is excellent. The quality of facilities in the hostel is good. Our wardens are very helpful to us, and if there is any issue, they respond immediately. The mess, canteen, and medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: They provide facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and a separate block for the library. The infrastructure is so nice and good. The infrastructure looks like wow, and the sports sections are fewer. The facilities of the hostel are good.

reviews.review_heading: Great college for our B.Tech life with friendly faculty and superb placements.
reviews.review_text: College was ranked NAAC A, and there was no such good infrastructure till yet. Labs were okay, and systems were running slow. Roads were also not so good. If it rains, we have to face some problems but they are upgrading the infrastructure now, so hope it will be nice after it.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it was a good college and better to build a good career, and also good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel food is okay. Good environment, nice rooms, and good Wi-Fi are provided. Good canteen, it is open at 10 and closes at 6 pm, and they will also provide games and sports for the hostel day event, nice thing.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and placements.

The computer labs and department specific labs are well maintained and upgraded with the latest software and systems ensuring students gain practical knowledge along with theory. The library is another strong point with a wide collection of academi...

reviews.review_text: It has good infrastructure and classrooms with projectors. We have a big auditorium. Our department has well-maintained labs. The central library is spacious and has a good collection of books. Hostel facilities are average according to my friends, and they used to say the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and decent placements, with well-maintained infrastructure overall
reviews.review_text: Sri Vasavi Engineering College offers good infrastructure for my course with well-equipped labs, high-speed Wi-Fi across the campus, smart classrooms, and a spacious library with a vast collection of technical books and journals. The computer labs are updated with the latest software, providing a great learning environment.
